tanumadhyama.name: (1) tanumadhyamā
tanumadhyama.family: Metres with 6 Syllables in a quarter.
tanumadhyama.html:
(1) tanumadhyamā

Def. tyau cettanumadhyamā |
Sch. G. ta, ya|
Ex. mūrtirmuraśatroratyadbhutarūpā |
āstāṃ mama citte nityaṃ tanumadhyā ||

vidyullekha.name: (2) vidyullekhā
vidyullekha.family: Metres with 6 Syllables in a quarter.
vidyullekha.html:
(2) vidyullekhā

(Also called vāṇī)
Def. vidyullekhā mā maḥ
Sch. G. ma, ma| (3. 3)
Ex. śrīdīptī thīkīrtī dhīnītī gīḥprītī |
edhete dve dve te ye neme deveśe || Káv. 3. 36.

sasivadana.name: (3) śaśivadanā
sasivadana.family: Metres with 6 Syllables in a quarter.
sasivadana.html:
(3) śaśivadanā

Def. śaśivadanā nyau |
Sch. G. na, ya|
Ex. śaśivadanānāṃ vrajataruṇīnām |
adharasudhormi madhuripuraicchat ||

somaraji.name: (4) somarājī
somaraji.family: Metres with 6 Syllables in a quarter.
somaraji.html:
(4) somarājī

Def. dviyā somarājī |
Sch. G. ya, ya| (2. 4).
Ex. hare somarājī-samā te yaśaḥśrīḥ |
jaganmaṇḍalasya chinattyandhakarām ||

kumaralalita.name: (1) kumāralalitā
kumaralalita.family: Metres with 7 Syllables in a quarter.
kumaralalita.html:
(1) kumāralalitā

Def. kumāralalitā j s gāḥ |
Sch. G. ja, sa, ga| (3. 4.)
Ex. murāritanuvallī kumāralalitā sā |
vrajaiṇanayanānāṃ tatāna mudamuccaiḥ ||

madalekha.name: (2) madalekhā
madalekha.family: Metres with 7 Syllables in a quarter.
madalekha.html:
(2) madalekhā

Def. masgau syānmadalekhā |
Sch. G. ma, sa, ga| (3. 4)
Ex. raṅge bāhuvirugṇād dantīndrānmadalekhā |
lagnābhūnpuraśatrau kastūrīrasacarcā ||

madhumati.name: (3) madhumatī
madhumati.family: Metres with 7 Syllables in a quarter.
madhumati.html:
(3) madhumatī

Def. nanagi madhumatī |
Sch. G. na, na, ga (5. 2)
Ex. raviduhitṛtaṭe vanakusumatatiḥ |
vyadhita madhumatī madhumathanamudam ||

anustubh.name: (1) anuṣṭubh (also called śloka).
anustubh.family: Metres with 8 Syllables in a quarter.
anustubh.html:
(1) anuṣṭubh (also called śloka).

There are several varieties of this metre, but
that which is most in use has eight syllables in each
quarter, but of variable quantity. Thus the fifth
syllable of each quarter should be short, the sixth
long, and the seventh alternately long and short.
śloke ṣaṣṭhaṃ guru jñeyaṃ sarvatra laghu pañcamam |
dvicatuḥ pādayorhasvaṃ saptamaṃ dīrghamanyayoḥ ||
Ex. vāgarthāviva sampṛktau vāgarthapratipattaye |
jagataḥ pitarau vande pārvatīparameśvarau || R. 1. 1.

gajagati.name: (2) gajagati
gajagati.family: Metres with 8 Syllables in a quarter.
gajagati.html:
(2) gajagati

Def. nabhalagā gajagatiḥ |
Sch. G. na, bha, la, ga (4. 4.)
Ex. ravisutāparisare viharato dṛśi hareḥ |
vrajavadhūgajagatirmudamalaṃ vyatanuta ||

pramanika.name: (3) pramāṇikā
pramanika.family: Metres with 8 Syllables in a quarter.
pramanika.html:
(3) pramāṇikā

Def. pramāṇikā jarau lagau |
Sch. G. ja, ra, la, ga (4. 4)
Ex. punātu bhaktiracyutā sadācyutāṅghripadmayoḥ |
śrutismṛtipramāṇikā bhavāmburāśitārikā ||

manavaka.name: (4) māṇavaka
manavaka.family: Metres with 8 Syllables in a quarter.
manavaka.html:
(4) māṇavaka

Def. bhāttalagā māṇavakam |
Sch. G. bha, ta, la, ga, (4. 4)
Ex. cañcalacūḍaṃ capalairvatsakulaiḥ keliparam |
dhyāya sakhe smeramukhaṃ nandasutaṃ māṇavakam ||

vidyunmala.name: (5) vidyunmālā
vidyunmala.family: Metres with 8 Syllables in a quarter.
vidyunmala.html:
(5) vidyunmālā

Def. mo mo go go vidyunmālā |
Sch. G. ma, ma, ga, ga, (4. 4)
Ex. vāsovallī vidyunmālā barhaśreṇī śākraścāpaḥ |
yasminnāstāṃ tāpocchittyai gomadhyasthaḥ kṛṣṇāmbhodaḥ ||

samanika.name: (6) samānikā
samanika.family: Metres with 8 Syllables in a quarter.
samanika.html:
(6) samānikā

Def. glau rajau samānikā tu |
Sch. G. ra, ja, ga, la (4. 4.)
Ex. yasya kṛṣṇapādapadmamasti hṛttaḍāgasadma |
dhīḥ samānikā pareṇa nocitātra matsareṇa ||

bhujagasisubhrta.name: (1) bhujagaśiśubhṛtā
bhujagasisubhrta.family: Metres with 9 Syllables in a quarter.
bhujagasisubhrta.html:
(1) bhujagaśiśubhṛtā

Def. bhujagaśiśubhṛtā nau maḥ |
Sch. G. na, na, ma (7. 2)
Ex. hradataṭanikaṭakṣauṇī bhujagaśiśubhṛtā yā'sīt |
muraripudalite nāge vrajajanasukhadā sā ' bhūt ||

bhujamgasamgata.name: (2) bhujaṅgasaṅgatā
bhujamgasamgata.family: Metres with 9 Syllables in a quarter.
bhujamgasamgata.html:
(2) bhujaṅgasaṅgatā

Def. sajarairbhujaṅgasaṅgatā |
Sch. G. sa, ja, ra, (3. 6)
Ex. taralā taraṅgiriṅgitairyamunā bhujaṅgasaṅgatā |
kathameti vatsacārakaścapalaḥ sadaiva tāṃ hariḥ ||

manimadhya.name: (3) maṇimadhya
manimadhya.family: Metres with 9 Syllables in a quarter.
manimadhya.html:
(3) maṇimadhya

Def. syānmaṇimadhyaṃ cedbhamasāḥ |
Sch. G. bha, ma, sa, (5. 4)
Ex. kāliyabhogābhogagatastanmaṇimadhyasphītarucā |
citrapadābho nandasutaścāru nanarta smeramukhaḥ ||

tvaritagati.name: (1) tvaritagati
tvaritagati.family: Metres with 10 Syllables in a quarter.
tvaritagati.html:
(1) tvaritagati

Def. tvaritagatiśca najanagaiḥ |
Sch. G. na, ja, na, ga (5. 5)
Ex. tvaritagatirvrajayuvatistaraṇisutā vipinagatā |
muraripuṇā ratiguruṇā pariramitā pramadamitā ||

matta.name: (2) mattā
matta.family: Metres with 10 Syllables in a quarter.
matta.html:
(2) mattā

Def. jñeyā mattā mabhasagasṛṣṭā |
Sch. G. ma, bha, sa, ga (4. 6)
Ex. pītvā mattā madhu madhupālī
kālindīye taṭavanakuñje |
uddīvyantīr vrajajanarāmāḥ
kāmāsaktā madhujiti cakre ||

rukmavati.name: (3) rukmavatī
rukmavati.family: Metres with 10 Syllables in a quarter.
rukmavati.html:
(3) rukmavatī

(Also called campakamālā).
Def. rukmavatī sā yatra bhamasgāḥ |
Sch. G. bha, ma, sa, ga (5. 5)
Ex. kāyamanovākyaiḥ pariśuddhai-
ryasya sadā kaṃsadviṣi bhaktiḥ |
rājyapade harmyālirudārā
rukmavatī vighnaḥ khalu tasya ||

imdravajra.name: (1) indravajrā
imdravajra.family: Metres with 11 Syllables in a quarter.
imdravajra.html:
(1) indravajrā

Def. syādindravajrā yadi tau jagau gaḥ |
Sch. G. ta, ta, ja, ga, ga (5. 6)
Ex. goṣṭhe giriṃ savyakareṇa dhṛtvā
ruṣṭendravajrāhatimuktavṛṣṭau |
yo gokulaṃ gopakulaṃ ca susthaṃ
cakre sa no rakṣatu cakrapāṇiḥ ||

upemdravajra.name: (2) upendravajrā
upemdravajra.family: Metres with 11 Syllables in a quarter.
upemdravajra.html:
(2) upendravajrā

Def. upendravajrā prathame laghau sā |
Sch. G. ja, ta, ja, ga, ga (5. 6.)
Ex. upedravajrādimaṇicchaṭābhi-
rvibhaṣaṇānāṃ churitaṃ vapuste |
smarāmi gopībhirupāsyamānaṃ
surandrumūle maṇimaṇḍapastham ||

upajati.name: (3) upajāti
upajati.family: Metres with 11 Syllables in a quarter.
upajati.html:
(3) upajāti

Def. anantarodīritalakṣmabhājau
pādau yadīyāvupajātayastāḥ |
itthaṃ kilānyāsvapi miśritāsu
vadanti jātiṣvidameva nāma ||
Sch. G. When iṃdravajrā and upeṃdravajrā are mixed in one
stanza, the metre is called upajāti| It is said to have
14 varieties.
Ex. astyuttarasyāṃ diśi devatātmā
himālayo nāma nagādhirājaḥ |
pūrvāparau toyanidhī vagāhya
sthitaḥ pṛthivyā iva mānadaṇḍaḥ || Ku. 1. 1.
See R. 2, 5, 6, 7; 13, 14, 16, 18, Ku. 3; Ki. 17. &c.
When other metres also are mixed in one stanza,
the metre is still called upajāti; e. g. in the following
verse from Māgha there is a combination of vaṃśastha and indravaṃśā|
itthaṃ rathāśvebhaniṣādināṃ prage
gajo nṛpāṇāmatha toraṇādbahiḥ |
prasthānakālakṣamaveśakalpanā-
kṛtakṣaṇakṣepamudaikṣatācyutam ||

dodhaka.name: (4) dodhaka
dodhaka.family: Metres with 11 Syllables in a quarter.
dodhaka.html:
(4) dodhaka

Def. dodhakamicchati bhatritayādgau |
Sch. G. bha, bha, bha, ga, ga (6. 5)
Ex. yā na yayau priyamanyavadhūbhyaḥ
sāratarāgamanā yatamānam |
tena saheha bibharti rahaḥ strī
sāra tarāgamanāyatamānam || Si. 4. 45.

bhramaravilasitam.name: (5) bhramaravilasitaṃ
bhramaravilasitam.family: Metres with 11 Syllables in a quarter.
bhramaravilasitam.html:
(5) bhramaravilasitaṃ

(bhramaravilasitā)
Def. mbhau nlau gaḥ syād bhramaravilasitam |
Sch. G. ma, bha, na, la, ga (4, 7)
Ex. prītyai yūnāṃ vyavahitatapanāḥ
prauḍhadhvāntaṃ dinamiha jaladāḥ |
doṣāmanyaṃ vidadhati surata
krīḍāyāsaśramaśamapaṭavaḥ || Si. 4. 62.

rathoddhata.name: (6) rathoddhatā
rathoddhata.family: Metres with 11 Syllables in a quarter.
rathoddhata.html:
(6) rathoddhatā

Def. rātparairnaralagai rathoddhatā |
Sch. G. ra, na, ra, la, ga| (3. 8. or 4. 8)
Ex. kauśikena sa kila kṣitīśvaro
rāmamadhvaravighātaśāntaye |
kākapakṣadharametya yācita-
stejasāṃ hi na vayaḥ samīkṣyate || R. 11. 1.
See Ku. 8 also.

vatormi.name: (7) vātormī
vatormi.family: Metres with 11 Syllables in a quarter.
vatormi.html:
(7) vātormī

Def. vātormīyaṃ gaditā mbhau tagau gaḥ |
Sch. G. ma, bha, ta, ga, ga (4. 7)
Ex. dhyātā mūrtiḥ kṣaṇamapyacyutasya
śreṇī nāmnāṃ gaditā helayāpi |
saṃsāre'smin duritaṃ hanti puṃsāṃ
vātormī potamivāmbhodhimadhye ||

salini.name: (8) śālinī
salini.family: Metres with 11 Syllables in a quarter.
salini.html:
(8) śālinī

Def. māttau gau cecchālinī vedalokaiḥ |
Sch. G. ma, ta, ta, ga, ga (4. 7)
Ex. aṅgho hanti jñānavṛddhiṃ vidhatte
dharmaṃ datte kāmamarthaṃ ca sūte |
muktiṃ datte sarvadopāsyamānā
puṃsāṃ śraddhāśālinī viṣṇubhaktiḥ ||

svagata.name: (9) svāgatā
svagata.family: Metres with 11 Syllables in a quarter.
svagata.html:
(9) svāgatā

Def. svāgatā ranabhagairguruṇā ca
Sch. G. ra, na, bha, ga, ga| (3. 8)
Ex. yāvadāgamayate'tha narendrān
sa svayaṃvaramahāya mahīndraḥ |
tāvadeva ṛṣirindradidṛkṣu-
rnāradastridaśadhāma jagāma || N. 5. 1.
See Ki. 9, Si. 10.

imdravamsa.name: (1) indravaṃśā
imdravamsa.family: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter.
imdravamsa.html:
(1) indravaṃśā

Def. taccendravaṃśā prathamākṣare gurau |
Sch. G. indravaṃśā is the same as vaṃśasthavila or vaṃśastha
(see 13 below) except that its first
syllable is long:– The Ganas are,
ta, ja, ja, ra|
Ex. daityendravaṃśāgnirudīrṇadīdhitiḥ
pītāmbaro'sau jagatāṃ tamopahaḥ |
yasminmamajjuḥ śalabhā iva svayaṃ
te kaṃsacāṇūramukhā makhadviṣaḥ ||

camdravartma.name: (2) candravartma
camdravartma.family: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter.
camdravartma.html:
(2) candravartma

Def. candravartma nigadanti ranabhasaiḥ |
Sch. G. ra, na, bha, sa (4. 8.)
Ex. candravartma vihitaṃ ghanatimiraiḥ
rājavartma rahitaṃ janagamanaiḥ |
iṣṭavartma tadalaṅkuru sarase
kuñjavartmani haristava kutukī ||

jaladharamala.name: (3) jaladharamālā
jaladharamala.family: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter.
jaladharamala.html:
(3) jaladharamālā

Def. abdhyaṅgaiḥ syājjaladharamālāmbhau smau |
Sch. G. ma, bha, sa, ma (4. 8)
Ex. yā bhaktānāṃ kaliduritottaptānāṃ
tāpacchede jaladharamālā navyā |
bhavyākārā dinakaraputrīkūle
kelīlolā haritanuravyātsā vaḥ ||
See Ki. 5. 23.

jaloddhatagati.name: (4) jaloddhatagati
jaloddhatagati.family: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter.
jaloddhatagati.html:
(4) jaloddhatagati

Def. rasairjasajasā jaloddhatagatiḥ |
Sch. G. ja, sa, ja, sa (6. 6)
Ex. samīraśiśiraḥ śirassu vasatāṃ
satāṃ javanikā nikāmasukhinām |
bibharti janayannayaṃ mudamapā-
mapāyadhavalā balāhakatatīḥ || Si. 4. 54.

tamarasa.name: (5) tāmarasa
tamarasa.family: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter.
tamarasa.html:
(5) tāmarasa

Def. iha vada tāmarasaṃ najajā yaḥ |
Sch. G. na, ja, ja, ya (5. 7)
Ex. sphuṭasuṣamāmakarandamanojñaṃ
vrajalalanānayanālinipītam |
tava mukhatāmarasaṃ muraśatro
hṛdayataḍāgavikāśi mamāstu ||

totaka.name: (6) toṭaka
totaka.family: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter.
totaka.html:
(6) toṭaka

Def. vada toṭakamabdhisakārayutam |
Sch. G. sa, sa, sa, sa, (4. 4. 3.)
Ex. sa tatheti vineturudāramateḥ
pratigṛhya vaco visasarja munim |
tadalabdhapadaṃ hṛdi śokaghane
pratiyātamivāntikamasya guroḥ || R. 8. 91.
See Si. 6. 71.

drutavilambita.name: (7) drutavilambita
drutavilambita.family: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter.
drutavilambita.html:
(7) drutavilambita

Def. drutavilambitamāha nabhau bharau |
Sch. G. na, bha, bha, ra (4. 8, or 4. 4. 4)
Ex. munisutāpraṇayasmṛtirodhinā
mama ca muktamidaṃ tamasā manaḥ |
manasijena sakhe prahariṣyatā
dhanuṣi cūtaśaraśca niveśitaḥ || S. 6; see
R. 9, Si. 6 also.

prabha.name: (8) prabhā
prabha.family: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter.
prabha.html:
(8) prabhā

(also called mandākinī, pramuditavadanā).
Def. svaraśaraviratirnanau rau prabhā |
Sch. G. na, na, ra, ra (7. 5)
Ex. atisuramirabhāji puṣpaśriyā-
matanuta ratayeva santānakaḥ |
taruṇaparabhṛtaḥ svanaṃ rāgiṇā-
matanuta rataye vasantānakaḥ || Si. 6. 67; also
Ki. 5. 21.

pramitaksara.name: (9) pramitākṣarā
pramitaksara.family: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter.
pramitaksara.html:
(9) pramitākṣarā

Def. pramitākṣarā sajasasaiḥ kathitā |
Sch. G. sa, ja, sa, sa, (5. 7)
Ex. vihagāḥ kadambasurabhāviha gāḥ
kalayantyanukṣaṇamanekalayam |
bhramayannapaiti muhurabhramayaṃ
pavanaśca dhūtanavanīpavanaḥ || Si. 4. 36,
Ki. 6, Si. 9 also.
(10) bhujaṅgaprayāta
Def. bhujaṅgaprayātaṃ caturbhiryakāraiḥ |
Sch. G. ya, ya, ya, ya (6. 6)
Ex. dhanairniṣkulīnāḥ kulīnā bhavanti
dhanairāpadaṃ mānavā nistaranti |
dhanebhyaḥ paro bāndhavo nāsti loke
dhanānyarjayadhvaṃ dhanānyarjayadhvam ||
(11) maṇimālā
Def. tyau tyau maṇimālā chinnā guhavaktraiḥ |
Sch. G. ta, ya, ta, ya (6. 6).
Ex. prahvāmaramaulau ratnopalakḷpte
jātaprativimbā śoṇā maṇimālā |
govindapadābje rājī nakharāṇā-
māstāṃ mama citte dhvāntaṃ śamayantī ||
(12) mālatī
(Also called yamunā)
Def. bhavati na jāvatha mālatī jarau |
Sch. G. na, ja, ja, ra (5. 7)
Ex. iha kalayācyutakelikānane
madhurasasaurabhasāralolupaḥ |
kusumakṛtasmitacāruvibhramā-
malirapi cumbati mālatīṃ muhuḥ ||
(13) vaṃśasthavila
(Also called vaṃśastha and vaṃśastanita)
Def. vadanti vaṃśasthavilaṃ jatau jarau |
Sch. G. ja, ta, ja, ra (5. 7)
Ex. tathā samakṣaṃ dahatā ganobhavaṃ
pinākinā bhagnamanorathā satī |
nininda rūpaṃ hṛdayena pārvatī
priyeṣu saubhāgyaphalā hi cārutā || Ku. 5. 1
See R. 3 also.
(14) vaiśvadevī
Def. bāṇāśvaiśchinnā vaiśvadevī mamau yau |
Sch. G. ma, ma, ya, ya, (5. 7)
Ex. arcāmanyeṣāṃ tvaṃ vihāyāmarāṇā-
madvaitenaikaṃ viṣṇumabhyarcya bhaktyā |
tatrāśeṣātmanyarcite bhāvinī te
bhrātaḥ sampannārādhanā vaiśvadevī ||
(15) sragviṇī
Def. kīrtitaiṣā catūrephikā sragviṇī |
Sch. G. ra, ra, ra, ra (6. 6)
Ex. indranīlopalīneva yā nirmitā
śātakumbhadravālaṅkṛtā śobhate |
navyameghacchaviḥ pītavāsā hare-
mūrtirāstāṃ jayāyorasi sragviṇī ||
See Si. 4. 42.

kalahamsa.name: (1) kalahaṃsa
kalahamsa.family: Metres with 13 Syllables in a quarter.
kalahamsa.html:
(1) kalahaṃsa

(Also called siṃhanāda and kuṭajā)
Def. sajasāḥ sagau ca kathitaḥ kalahaṃsaḥ |
Sch. G. sa, ja, sa, sa, ga (7. 6)
Ex. yamunāvihāgkutuke kalahaṃso
vrajakāminīkamalinīkṛtakeliḥ |
janacittahārikalakaṇṭhaninādaḥ
pramadaṃ tanotu tava nandatanūjaḥ ||
See Si. 6. 73.

ksama.name: (2) kṣamā
ksama.family: Metres with 13 Syllables in a quarter.
ksama.html:
(2) kṣamā

(Also called candrikā and utpalinī).
Def. turagarasayatirnau tatau gaḥ kṣamā |
Sch. G. na, na, ta, ta, ga (6. 7)
Ex. iha duradhigamaiḥ kiñcidevāgamaiḥ
satatamasutaraṃ varṇayantyantaram |
amumativipinaṃ veda digvyāpinaṃ
puruṣamiva paraṃ padmayoniḥ param || Ki. 5. 18.

praharsini.name: (3) praharṣiṇī
praharsini.family: Metres with 13 Syllables in a quarter.
praharsini.html:
(3) praharṣiṇī

Def. tryāśābhirmanajaragāḥ praharṣiṇīyam |
Sch. G. ma, na, ja, ra, ga (3. 10)
Ex. te rekhādhvajakuliśātapatracihnaṃ
samrājaścaraṇayugaṃ prasādalabhyam |
prasthānapraṇatibhiraṅgulīṣu cakru-
rmaulisrakcyutamakarandareṇugauram || R. 4. 88.
See Ki. 7, Si. 8.

mamjubhasini.name: (4) mañjubhāṣiṇī
mamjubhasini.family: Metres with 13 Syllables in a quarter.
mamjubhasini.html:
(4) mañjubhāṣiṇī

(Also called sunandinī and prabodhitā)
Def. sajasā jagau ca yadi mañjubhāṣiṇī |
Sch. G. sa, ja, sa, ja, ga, (6. 7)
Ex. yamunāmatītamatha śuśruvānamuṃ
tapasastanūja iti nādhunocyate |
sa yadā'calannijapurādaharniśaṃ
nṛpatestadādi samacāri vārtayā || Si. 13. 1.

mattamayuri.name: (5) mattamayūrī
mattamayuri.family: Metres with 13 Syllables in a quarter.
mattamayuri.html:
(5) mattamayūrī

Def. vedairandhrairmtau yasagā mattamayūraḥ |
Sch. G. ma, ta, ya, sa, ga (4. 9)
Ex. dṛṣṭvā dṛśyānyācaraṇīyāni vidhāya
prekṣākārī yāti yadaṃ muktamapāyaiḥ |
samyagdṛṣṭistasya paraṃ paśyati yastvāṃ
yaścopāste sādhu vidheyaṃ sa vidhatte || Ki. 18. 28;
Si. 4. 44, 6. 76, also R. 9. 75.

rucira.name: (6) rucirā
rucira.family: Metres with 13 Syllables in a quarter.
rucira.html:
(6) rucirā

(Also called prabhāvatī)
Def. jabhau sajau giti rucirā caturgrahaiḥ |
Sch. G. ja, bha, sa, ja ga (4. 9)
Ex. kadā mukhaṃ varatanu kāraṇādṛte
tavāgataṃ kṣaṇamapi kopapātratām |
aparvaṇi grahakaluṣendumaṇḍalā
vibhāvarī kathaya kathaṃ bhaviṣyati || M. 4. 13.
See Bk. 1. 1, Si. 17.

aparajita.name: (1) aparājitā
aparajita.family: Metres with 14 Syllables in a quarter.
aparajita.html:
(1) aparājitā

Def. nanaramalaghugaiḥ svarairaparājitā |
Sch. G. na, na, ra, sa, la, ga (7. 7)
Ex. yadanavadhibhujapratāpakṛtāspadā
yadunicayacamūḥ parairaparājitā |
vyajayata samare samastaripuvrajaṃ
sa jayati jagatāṃ gatirgaruḍadhvajaḥ ||

asambadha.name: (2) asambādhā
asambadha.family: Metres with 14 Syllables in a quarter.
asambadha.html:
(2) asambādhā

Def. mtau nsau gāvakṣagrahaviratirasambādhā |
Sch. G. ma, ta, na, sa, ga, ga (5. 9)
Ex. vīryāgnau yena jvalati raṇavaśātkṣipte
daityendre jātā dharaṇiriyamasambādhā |
dharmasthityarthaṃ prakaṭitatanusambandhaḥ
sādhūnāṃ bādhāṃ praśamayatu sa kaṃsāriḥ ||

pathya.name: (3) pathyā
pathya.family: Metres with 14 Syllables in a quarter.
pathya.html:
(3) pathyā

(Also called mañjarī)
Def. sajasā yalau ca saha gena pathyā matā |
Sch. G. sa, ja, sa, ya, la, ga (5. 9)
Ex. sthagayantyamūḥ śamitacātakārtasvarāḥ
jaladāstaḍittulitakāntakārtasvarāḥ |
jagatīriha sphuritacārucāmīkarāḥ
savituḥ kvacitkapiśayanti cāmī karāḥ ||
Si. 4. 24.

pramada.name: (4) pramadā (also called kurarīrutā)
pramada.family: Metres with 14 Syllables in a quarter.
pramada.html:
(4) pramadā (also called kurarīrutā |)

Def. najamajalā guruśca bhavati pramadā |
Sch. G. na, ja, ma, ja, la, ga (6. 8)
Ex. anaticirojjhitasya jaladevacira-
sthitabahubudbudasya payaso'nukṛtim |
viralavikīrṇavajraśakalā sakalā-
miha vidadhāti dhautakaladhautamahī || Si. 4. 41.

praharanakalika.name: (5) praharaṇakalikā
praharanakalika.family: Metres with 14 Syllables in a quarter.
praharanakalika.html:
(5) praharaṇakalikā

Def. nanabhanalagiti praharaṇakalikā |
Sch. G. na, na, bha, na, la, ga (7. 7)
Ex. vyathayati kusumapraharaṇakalikā
pramadavanabhavā tava dhanuṣi tatā |
virahavipadi me śaraṇamiha tato
madhumathanaguṇasmaraṇamaviratam ||

madhyaksama.name: (6) madhyakṣāmā
madhyaksama.family: Metres with 14 Syllables in a quarter.
madhyaksama.html:
(6) madhyakṣāmā

(Also called haṃsaśyenī or kuṭila)
Def. madhyakṣāmā yugadaśaviramā mbhau nyau gau |
Sch. G. ma, bha, na, ya, ga, ga (4. 10)
Ex. nītocchrāyaṃ muhuraśiśiraraśmerusrai-
rānīlābhairviracitaparabhāgā ratnaiḥ |
jyotsnāśaṅkāmiha vitarati haṃsaśyenī
madhyepyahnaḥ sphaṭikarajatabhitticchāyā || Ki. 5. 31

vasamtatilaka.name: (7) vasantatilakā
vasamtatilaka.family: Metres with 14 Syllables in a quarter.
vasamtatilaka.html:
(7) vasantatilakā

(Also called vasantatilaka
uddharṣiṇī, siṃhonnatā)
Def. uktā vasantatilakā tabhajā jagau gaḥ |
Sch. G. ta, bha, ja, ja, ga, ga (8. 6)
Ex. yātyekato'staśikharaṃ patiroṣadhīnā-
māviṣkṛtāruṇapuraḥsara ekato'rkaḥ |
tejodvayasya yugapad vyasanodayābhyāṃ
loko niyamyata ivātmadaśāntareṣu || S. 4. 1.

vasamti.name: (8) vāsantī|
vasamti.family: Metres with 14 Syllables in a quarter.
vasamti.html:
(8) vāsantī|

Def. mātto no mo gau yadi gaditā vāsantīyam |
Sch. G. ma, ta, na, ma, ga, ga (4. 6. 4)
Ex. bhrāmyadbhṛṅgīnirbharamadhurālāpodgītaiḥ
śrīkhaṇḍādreradbhutapavanairmandāndolā |
līlālolā pallavavilasaddhastollāsaiḥ
kaṃsārātau nṛtyati sadṛśī vāsantīyam ||

tunaka.name: (1) tūṇaka
tunaka.family: Metres with 15 Syllables in a quarter.
tunaka.html:
(1) tūṇaka

(Also called cārucāmara)
Def. tūṇakaṃ samānikā padadvayaṃ vināntimam |
Sch. G. ra, ja, ra, ja, ra (4. 4. 4. 3, or 7. 8).
Ex. sā suvarṇaketakaṃ vikāśi bhṛṅgapūritaṃ
pañcabāṇabāṇajālapūrṇahetitūṇakam |
rādhikā vitarkya mādhavādya māsi mādhave
mohameti nirbharaṃ tvayā vinā kalānidhe ||

malini.name: (2) mālinī
malini.family: Metres with 15 Syllables in a quarter.
malini.html:
(2) mālinī

Def. nanamayayuteyaṃ mālinī bhogilokaiḥ |
Sch. G. na, na, ma, ya, ya (8. 7)
Ex. śaśinamupagateyaṃ kaumudī meghamuktaṃ
jalanidhimanurūpaṃ jahnukanyāvatīrṇā |
iti samaguṇayogaprītayastatra paurāḥ
śravaṇakaṭu nṛpāṇāmekavākyaṃ vivavruḥ || R. 6. 85.

lilakhela.name: (3) līlākhela
lilakhela.family: Metres with 15 Syllables in a quarter.
lilakhela.html:
(3) līlākhela

Def. ekanyūnau vidyunmālāpādau cellīlākhelaḥ |
Sch. G. ma, ma, ma, ma, ma|
Ex. mā kānte pakṣasyānte paryākāśe deśe svāpsīḥ
kāntaṃ vaktraṃ vṛttaṃ pūrṇaṃ candraṃ matvā rātrau cet |
kṣutkṣāmaḥ prāṭaṃścetaśceto rāhuḥ krūraḥ prādyāt
tasmād dhvānte harmyasyānte śayyaikānte kartavyā ||
Sar. K.

sasikala.name: (4) śaśikalā
sasikala.family: Metres with 15 Syllables in a quarter.
sasikala.html:
(4) śaśikalā

Def. gurunidhanamanulaghuriha śaśikalā |
Sch. G. na, na, na, na, sa (all short syllables
except the last).
Ex. malayajatilakasabhuditaśaśikalā
vrajayuvatilasadalikagamanatā |
sarasijanayanahṛdayasalilanidhiṃ
vyatanuta vitatarabhasaparitaralam ||

citra.name: (1) citra
citra.family: Metres with 16 Syllables in a quarter.
citra.html:
(1) citra

Def. vitrasañjñamīritaṃ rajau rajau ragau ca vṛttam |
Sch. G. ra, ja, ra, ja, ra, ga (8. 8. or 4. 4. 4. 4.)
Ex. vidrumāruṇādharauṣṭhaśobhiveṇuvādyahṛṣṭa-
vallavījanāṅgasaṅgajātamugdhakaṇṭhakāṅga |
tvāṃ sadaiva vāsudeva puṇyalabhyapāda deva
vanyapuṣpacitrakeśa saṃsmarāmi gopaveśa ||

pamcacamara.name: (2) pañcacāmara
pamcacamara.family: Metres with 16 Syllables in a quarter.
pamcacamara.html:
(2) pañcacāmara

Def. pramāṇikāpadadvayaṃ vadanti pañcacāmaram |
or jarau jarau tato jagau ca pañcacāmaraṃ vadet
Sch. G. ja, ra, ja, ra, ja, ga (8. 8. or 4. 4. 4. 4)
Ex. suradrumūlamaṇḍape vicitraratnanirmite
lasadvitānabhūṣite salīlavibhramālasam |
surāṅganābhavallavīkaraprapañcacāmara-
sphuratsamīravījitaṃ sadācyutaṃ bhajāmi tam ||

vanini.name: (3) vāṇinī
vanini.family: Metres with 16 Syllables in a quarter.
vanini.html:
(3) vāṇinī

Def. najabhajarairyadā bhavati vāṇinī gayuktaiḥ |
Sch. G. na, ja, bha, ja, ra, ga|
Ex. sphuratu mamānane'dya nanu vāṇi nītiramyaṃ
tavacaraṇaprasādaparipākataḥ kavitvam |
bhavajalarāśipārakaraṇakṣamaṃ mukundaṃ
satatamahaṃ stavaiḥ svacaritaiḥ stavāmi nityam ||

citralekha.name: (2) citralekhā|
citralekha.family: Metres with 18 Syllables in a quarter.
citralekha.html:
(2) citralekhā|

Def. mandākrāntā naparalaghuyutā kīrtitā citralekhrā |
Sch. G. ma, bha, na, ya, ya, ya (4. 7. 7.)
Ex. śaṅke'muṣmiñ jagati mṛgadṛśāṃ sārarūpaṃ yadāsī-
dākṛṣyedaṃ vrajayuvatisabhā vedhasā sā vyadhāyi |
naitādṛk cet kathamudadhisutāmantareṇācyutasya
prītaṃ tasyā nayanayugamabhūccitralekhādbhutāyām ||

nardataka.name: (2) narkuṭaka
nardataka.family: Metres with 17 Syllables in a quarter.
nardataka.html:
(2) narkuṭaka

Def. yadi bhavato najau bhajajalā guru nardaṭakam |
Sch. G. na, ja, bha, ja, ja, la, ga (8. 9)
Ex. taruṇatamālanīlabahulonnamadambudharāḥ
śiśirasamīraṇāvadhūtanūtanavārikaṇāḥ |
kathamavalokayeyamadhunā harihetimatī
rmadakalanīlakaṇṭhakalahairmukharāḥ kukubhaḥ ||
Māl. 9. 18, see 5. 31.

prthvi.name: (3) pṛthvī
prthvi.family: Metres with 17 Syllables in a quarter.
prthvi.html:
(3) pṛthvī

Def. jasau jasayalā vasugrahayatiśca pṛthvī guruḥ |
Sch. G. ja, sa, ja, sa, ya, la, ga (8. 9)
Ex. itaḥ svapiti keśavaḥ kulamitastadīyadviṣā-
mitaśca śaraṇārthiṃnaḥ śikhariṇāṃ gaṇāḥ śerate |
itopi vaḍavānalaḥ saha samastasaṃvartakai-
raho vitatamūrjitaṃ narasahaṃ ca sindhorvapuḥ || Bh. 2. 76

mamdakramta.name: (4) mandākrāntā
mamdakramta.family: Metres with 17 Syllables in a quarter.
mamdakramta.html:
(4) mandākrāntā

Def. mandākrāntāmbudhirasanagairmo bhanau tau gayugmam |
Sch. G. ma, bha, na, ta, ta, ga, ga (4. 6. 7)
Ex. gopī bharturviharavidhurā kācidindīvarākṣī
unmatteva skhalitakavarī niḥśvasantī viśālam |
atraivāste muraripuriti bhrāntidūtīsaḍāyā
tyaktvā gehaṃ jhaṭiti yamunāmañjukuñjaṃ jagāma ||
Pad. D. 1.
(The whole of the “Meghadu4ta is written in this
metre).

vamsapatrapatita.name: (5) vaṃśapatrapatita
vamsapatrapatita.family: Metres with 17 Syllables in a quarter.
vamsapatrapatita.html:
(5) vaṃśapatrapatita

Def. diṅmunivaṃśapatrapatitaṃ bharanabhanalagaiḥ |
Sch. G. bha, ra, na, bha, na, la, ga (10. 7)
Ex. darpaṇanirmalāsu patite ghanatimiramuṣi
jyotiṣi raupyabhittiṣu puraḥ pratiphalati muhuḥ |
vrīḍamasaṃmukhopi ramaṇairapahṛtavasanāḥ
kāñcanakandarāsu taruṇīriha nayati raviḥ ||
Si. 4. 67.

sikharini.name: (6) śikhariṇī
sikharini.family: Metres with 17 Syllables in a quarter.
sikharini.html:
(6) śikhariṇī

Def. rasairudrauśchinnā yamanasabhalāgaḥ śikhariṇī
Sch. G. ya, ma, na, sa, bha, la, ga (6. 11)
Ex. digante śrūyante madamalitagaṇḍāḥ karaṭinaḥ
kariṇyaḥ kāruṇyāspadamasamaśīlāḥ khalu mṛgāḥ |
idānīṃ lokesminnanupamaśikhānāṃ punarayaṃ
nakhānāṃ pāṇḍityaṃ prakaṭayatu kasmin mṛgapatiḥ ||
Bv. 1. 2.

harini.name: (7) hariṇī
harini.family: Metres with 17 Syllables in a quarter.
harini.html:
(7) hariṇī

Def. nasamarasalāgaḥ ṣaḍvedairhayairhariṇī matā |
Sch. G. na, sa, ma, ra, sa, la, ga (6. 4. 7)
Ex. sutanu hṛdayātpratyādeśavyalīkamapaitu te
kimapi manasaḥ saṃmoho me tadā balavānabhūt |
prabalatamasāmevamprāyāḥ śubheṣu hi vṛttayaḥ
srajamapi śirasyandhaḥ kṣiptāṃ dhunotyahiśaṅkayā ||
S. 7. 24.

kusumitalatavellita.name: (1) kusumitalatāvellitā|
kusumitalatavellita.family: Metres with 18 Syllables in a quarter.
kusumitalatavellita.html:
(1) kusumitalatāvellitā|

Def. syādbhūtartvaśvaiḥ kusumitalatāvellitā mtau nayau yau |
Sch. G. ma, ta, na, ya, ya, ya (5. 6. 7)
Ex. krīḍatkālindīlalitalaharīvāribhirdākṣiṇātyai-
rvātaiḥ kheladbhiḥ kusumitalatāvellitā mandamandam |
bhṛṅgālīgītaiḥ kisalayakarollāsitairlāsyalakṣmīṃ
tanvānā ceto rabhasataralaṃ cakrapāṇeścakāra ||

namdana.name: (3) nandana
namdana.family: Metres with 18 Syllables in a quarter.
namdana.html:
(3) nandana

Def. najabhajaraistu rephasahitaiḥ śivairhayairnandanam |
Sch. G. na, ja, bha, ja, ra, ra (11. 7)
Ex. taraṇisutātaraṅgapavanaiḥ salīlamāndolitaṃ
madhuripupādapaṅkajarajaḥsupūtapṛthvītalam |
muraharacitraceṣṭitakalākalāpasaṃsmārakaṃ
kṣititalanandanaṃ vraja sakhe sukhāya vṛndāvanam ||

naraca.name: (4) nārāca
naraca.family: Metres with 18 Syllables in a quarter.
naraca.html:
(4) nārāca

Def. iha nanaracatuṣkasṛṣṭaṃ tu nārācamācakṣate |
Sch. G. na, na, ra, ra, ra, ra (8. 5, 5)
Ex. raghupatirapi jātavedoviśuddhāṃ pragṛhya priyāṃ
priyasuhṛdi bibhīṣaṇe saṅkramayya śriyaṃ vairiṇaḥ |
ravisutasahitena tenānuyātaḥ sasaumitriṇā
bhujavijitavimānaratnādhirūḍhaḥ pratasthe purīm ||
R. 12. 104

sardulalalita.name: (5) śārdūlalalita
sardulalalita.family: Metres with 18 Syllables in a quarter.
sardulalalita.html:
(5) śārdūlalalita

Def. maḥ so jaḥ satasā dineśaṛtubhiḥ śārdūlalalitam |
Sch. G. ma, sa, ja, sa, ta, sa (12. 6.)
Ex. kṛtvā kaṃsamṛge parākramavidhiṃ śārdūlalalitaṃ
yaścakre kṣitibhārakāriṣu daraṃ caidyaprabhṛtiṣu |
santoṣaṃ paramaṃ tu devanivahe trailokyaśaraṇaṃ
śreyo naḥ sa tanotvapāramahimā lakṣmīpriyatamaḥ ||

meghavisphurjita.name: (1) meghavisphūrjitā
meghavisphurjita.family: Metres with 19 Syllables in a quarter.
meghavisphurjita.html:
(1) meghavisphūrjitā

Def. rasartvaśvairymau nsau raraguruyutau meghavisphūrjitā syāt |
Sch. G. ya, ma, na, sa, ra, ra, ga, (6. 6. 7)
Ex. kadambāmodāḍhyā vipinapavanaḥ kekinaḥ kāntakekāḥ
vinidrāḥ kandalyo diśi diśi mudā dardurā dṛptanādāḥ |
niśā nṛtyadvidyudvilasitalasanmeghavisphūrjitā cet
priyaḥ svādhīno'sau danujadalano rājyamasmātkimanyat ||

sardulavikridita.name: (2) śārdūlavikrīḍita
sardulavikridita.family: Metres with 19 Syllables in a quarter.
sardulavikridita.html:
(2) śārdūlavikrīḍita

Def. sūryāśvairyadi maḥ sajau satatagāḥ śārdūlavikrīḍitam |
Sch. G. ma, sa, ja, sa, ta, ta, ga (12. 7)
Ex. vedānteṣu yamāhurekapuruṣaṃ vyāpya sthitaṃ rodasī
yasminnīśvara ityananyaviṣayaḥ śabdo yathārthākṣaraḥ |
antaryaśca mumukṣubhirniyamitaprāṇādibhirmṛgyate
sa sthāṇuḥ sthirabhaktiyogasulabho niḥśreyasāyāstu vaḥ
V. 1. 1.

sumadhura.name: (3) sumadhurā
sumadhura.family: Metres with 19 Syllables in a quarter.
sumadhura.html:
(3) sumadhurā

Def. mrau bhnau mo no guruśced hayaṛturasairuktā sumadhurā |
Sch. G. ma, ra, bha, na, ma, na, ga (7. 6. 6)
Ex. vedārthān prākṛtastvaṃ vadasi na ca te jihvā nipatitā
madhyāhne vīkṣase'rkaṃ na tava sahasā dṛṣṭirvicalitā |
dīptāgnau pāṇimantaḥ kṣipasi sa ca te dagdho bhavati no
cāritryāccārudattaṃ calayasi na te dehaṃ harati bhūḥ ||
Mk. 9. 21.

surasa.name: (4) surasā
surasa.family: Metres with 19 Syllables in a quarter.
surasa.html:
(4) surasā

Def. mrau bhnau yo no guruścet svaramunikaraṇairāha surasām |
Sch. G. ma, ra, bha, na, ya, na, ga (7. 7. 5)
Ex. kāmakrīḍāsatṛṣṇo madhusamayasamārambharabhasāt
kālindīkūlakuñje viharaṇakutukākṛṣṭahṛdayaḥ |
govindo ballavīnāmadhararasasudhāṃ prāpya surasāṃ
śaṅke pīyūṣapānaiḥ pracayakṛtasukhaṃ vyasmaradasau ||

gitika.name: (1) gītikā
gitika.family: Metres with 20 Syllables in a quarter.
gitika.html:
(1) gītikā

Def. sajasā bharau salagā yadā kathitā tadā khalu gītikā
Sch. G. sa, ja, sa, bha, ra, sa, la, ga (5. 7. 8)
Ex. karatālacañcalakaṅkaṇasvanamiśraṇena manoramā
ramaṇīyaveṇuninādaraṅgimasaṅgamena sukhāvahā |
bahalānurāganivāsarāsasamudbhavā tava rāgiṇaṃ
vidadhau hariṃ khalu vallavījanacārucāmaragītikā ||

sucadana.name: (2) suvadanā
sucadana.family: Metres with 20 Syllables in a quarter.
sucadana.html:
(2) suvadanā

Def. jñeyā saptaśvaṣaḍbhirmarabhanayayutā mlau gaḥ suvadanā
Sch. G. ma, ra, bha, na, ya, ma, la, ga (7. 7. 6)
Ex. uttuṅgāstuṅgakūlaṃ srutamadasalilāḥ prasyandi salilaṃ
śyāmāḥ śyāmopakaṇṭhadrumamatimukharāḥ kallolamukharam |
srotaḥkhātāvasīdattaṭamurudaśanairutsāditataṭāḥ
śoṇaṃ sindūraśoṇā mama gajapatayaḥ pāsyanti śataśaḥ ||
Mu. 4. 16.

pamcakavali.name: (1) pañcakāvalī
pamcakavali.family: Metres with 21 Syllables in a quarter.
pamcakavali.html:
(1) pañcakāvalī

(Also called sarasī, dhṛtaśrī)
Def. najabhajajā jarau narapate kathitā bhuvi pañcakāvalī| |
Sch. G. na, ja, bha, ja, ja, ja, ra (7. 7. 7)
Ex. turagaśatākulasya paritaḥ paramekatu raṅgajanmanaḥ
pramathitabhūbhṛtaḥ pratipathaṃ mathitasya bhṛśaṃ mahībhṛtā |
paricalato balānujabalasya puraḥ satataṃ dhṛtaśriya-
ściragalitaśriyo jalanidheśca tadā'bhavadantaraṃ mahat ||
Si. 3. 82.

sragdhara.name: (2) sragdharā
sragdhara.family: Metres with 21 Syllables in a quarter.
sragdhara.html:
(2) sragdharā

Def. mrabhnairyānāṃ trayeṇa trimuniyatiyutā sragdharā kīrtiteyam
Sch. G. ma, ra, bha, na, ya, ya, ya (7. 7. 7.)
Ex. yā sṛṣṭiḥ sraṣṭurādyā vahat vidhihutaṃ yā haviryā ca hotrī
ya dve kālaṃ vidhattaḥ śrutiviṣayaguṇā yā sthitā vyāpya viśvam |
yāmāhuḥ sarvabhūtaprakṛtiriti yayā prāṇinaḥ prāṇavantaḥ
pratyakṣābhiḥ prapannastanubhiravatu vastābhiraṣṭābhirīśaḥ ||
S. 1. 1.

damdaka.name: daṇḍaka|
damdaka.family: Metres with 26 Syllables in a quarter.
damdaka.html:
daṇḍaka|

Metres with 27 or more letters in each quarter are
designated by the general name daṇḍaka The highest
number of syllables in a quarter of this species of
metre is said to be 999. In each quarter there must be
first two naganas or six short syllables, and the remaining
may be either raganas or yaganas, or all the feet may
be saganas. The classes of daṇḍaka usually mentioned are
caṇḍavṛṣṭiprayāta, pracitaka, mattamātaṅgalīlākara, siṃhavikrānta, kusumasta-
vaka, anaṅgaśekhara, saṅgrāma &c. Mál. 5. 23 is an instance of
this last species of Daṇḍaka.

aparavaktra.name: (1) aparavaktra
aparavaktra.family: Metres with 26 Syllables in a quarter.
aparavaktra.html:
(1) aparavaktra

(Sometimes called vaitālīya)
Def. ayuji nanaralā guruḥ same
tadaparavaktramidaṃ najau jarau |
Sch. G. na, na, ra, la, ga, (odd quarter)
na, ja, ja, ra (even quarter)
Ex. sphuṭasumadhuraveṇugītimi-
stamaparavaktramavetya mādhavam |
mṛgayuvatigaṇaiḥ samaṃ sthitā
vrajavanitā dhṛtacittavibhramā ||

upacitra.name: (2) upacitra
upacitra.family: Metres with 26 Syllables in a quarter.
upacitra.html:
(2) upacitra

Def. viṣame yadi sau salagā dale
bhau yuji bhādgurukāvupacitram |
Sch. G. sa, sa, sa, la, ga (odd quarter)
bha, bha, bha, ga, ga (even quarter)
Ex. muravairivapustanutāṃ mudaṃ
hemanibhāṃśukacandanaliptam |
gaganaṃ capalāmilitaṃ yathā
śāradanīradharairupacitram ||

puspitagra.name: (3) puṣpitāgrā
puspitagra.family: Metres with 26 Syllables in a quarter.
puspitagra.html:
(3) puṣpitāgrā

(Also called aupacchandasika)
Def. ayuji nayugarephato yakāro
yuji tu najau jaragāśca puṣpitāgrā |
Sch. G. na, na, ra, ya (odd quarter)
na, ja, ja, ra, ga (even quarter)
Ex. atha madanavadhūrupaplavāntaṃ
vyasanakṛśā paripālayāmbabhūva |
śaśina iva divātanasya lekhā
kiraṇaparikṣayadhūsarā pradoṣam ||
Ku. 4. 46.

viyogini.name: (4) viyoginī
viyogini.family: Metres with 26 Syllables in a quarter.
viyogini.html:
(4) viyoginī

(Also called vaitālīya or sundarī)
Def. viṣame samajā guruḥ same
sabharā lo'tha guruviṃyoginī |
Sch. G. sa, sa, ja, ga (odd quarter)
sa, bha, ra, la, ga (even quarter)
Ex. sahasā vidadhīta na kriyā-
mavivekaḥ paramāpadāṃ padam |
vṛṇate hi vimṛśyakāriṇaṃ
guṇalubdhāḥ svayameva sampadaḥ || Ki. 2. 30.

vegavati.name: (5) vegavatī
vegavati.family: Metres with 26 Syllables in a quarter.
vegavati.html:
(5) vegavatī

Def. sayugātsagurū viṣame ced |
bhāviha vegavatī yuji bhādgau |
Sch. G. sa, sa, sa, ga (odd quarter)
bha, bha, bha, ga (even quarter)
Ex. smaravegavatī vrajarāmā
keśavavaṃśaravairatimugdhā |
rabhasānna gurūn gaṇayantī
kelinikuñjagṛhāya jagāma ||

harinapluta.name: (1) hariṇaplutā
harinapluta.family: Metres with 26 Syllables in a quarter.
harinapluta.html:
(1) hariṇaplutā

Def. sayugātsalaghū viṣame guru-
ryuji nabhau bharakau hariṇaplutā |
Sch. G. sa, sa, sa, la, ga (odd quarter).
na, bha, bha, ra (even quarter).
Ex. sphuṭaphenacayā hariṇaplutā
balimanojñataṭā taraṇeḥ sutā |
kalahaṃsakulāravaśālinī
viharato harati sma harermanaḥ ||
N. B. Metres like aparavaktra or aupacchandasika and vaitālayi
or viyoginī are usually treated as jātis; (see Section
D). But they are sometimes defined in the Gaṇa
scheme, and are, therefore, given under the class of
Vṛittas.

udgata.name: viṣamavṛtta / udgatā
udgata.html:
viṣamavṛtta / udgatā

viṣamavṛtta (Unequal Metres).
The most common metre of this class is called
udgatā|
Def. prathame sajau yadi salau ca
nasajagurukāṇyanantaram |
yadyatha bhanajalagāḥ syuratho
sajasā jagau ca bhavatīyamudgatā ||
Sch. G. sa, ja, sa, la (first quarter)
na, sa, ja, ga (second “)
bha, na, ja, la, ga, (third “)
sa, ja, sa, ja, ga, (fourth “)
Ex. atha vāsavasya vacanena
ruciravadanastrilocanam |
klāntirahitamabhirādhayituṃ
vidhivattapāṃsi vidadhe dhanañjayaḥ || Ki. 12. 1.
See Si. 15 also.
Another variety of udgatā is mentioned wherein the
third quarter has bha, na, bha, ga instead of bha, na, ja, la, ga|
Other kinds of metre in which every quarter of the
stanza differs in the number of syllables, are includ-
ed under the general name ‘Gāthā’. The same name
is applicable to stanzas consisting of any number of
quarters other than four. As in the case of upajāti,
any two or more quarters of a regular metre may be
combined to form ardhasamavṛtta or viṣamavṛtta|

arya.name: (1) āryā
arya.family: Metres with 26 Syllables in a quarter.
arya.html:
(1) āryā

Def. yasyāḥ pāde prathame dvādaśamātrāstathā tṛtīyepi |
aṣṭādaśa dvitīye caturthake pañcadaśa sāryā ||
Srut. 4.
The first and third quarters must each contain 12
mātrās or syllabic instants (one being allotted to a
short vowel, and two to a long one), the second 18,
and the fourth 15.
Ex. pratipakṣeṇāpi patiṃ sevante bhartṛvatsalāḥ sādhvyaḥ |
anyasaritāṃ śatāni hi samudragāḥ prāpayantyabdhim ||
M. 5. 19.
The whole of Govardhana’s āryāsaptaśatī is written
in this metre.

goti.name: (2) gīti|
goti.family: Metres with 26 Syllables in a quarter.
goti.html:
(2) gīti|

Def. āryāpūrvārdhasamaṃ dvitīyamapi bhavati yatra haṃsagate |
chandovidastadānīṃ gītiṃ tāmamṛtavāṇi bhāṣate ||
Srut. 5.
The first and third quarters of this metre must con-
tain 12 syllabic instants each, and the second and
fourth 18 each.
Ex. pāṭīra tava paṭīyānkaḥ paripāṭīmimāmurīkartum |
yatpiṃṣatāmapi nṛṇāṃ piṣṭo'pi tanoṣi parimalaiḥ puṣṭim ||
Bv. 1. 12.

upagiti.name: (3) upagīti|
upagiti.family: Metres with 26 Syllables in a quarter.
upagiti.html:
(3) upagīti|

Def. āryottarārdhatulyaṃ prathamārdhamapi prayuktaṃ cet |
kāmini tāmupagīti pratibhāṣante mahākavayaḥ ||
Srut. 6.
The first and third quarters of this metre must con-
tain 12 syllabic instants each, and the second and
fourth 15 each.
Ex. natagopasundarīṇāṃ rāsollāse murārātim |
asmārayadupagītiḥ svargakuraṅgadṛśāṃ gīteḥ ||

udgiti.name: (4) udgīti
udgiti.family: Metres with 26 Syllables in a quarter.
udgiti.html:
(4) udgīti

āryāśakaladvitaye viparīte punarihodgītiḥ |
The first and third quarters of this metre must
contain 12 syllabic instants each, the second 15, and
the fourth 18.
Ex. nārāyaṇasya santatamudgītiḥ saṃsmṛtirbhaktyā |
arcāyāmāsaktirdustarasaṃsārasāgare taraṇiḥ ||

aryagiti.name: (5) āryāgīti|
aryagiti.family: Metres with 26 Syllables in a quarter.
aryagiti.html:
(5) āryāgīti|

Def. āryāprāgdalamante'dhikaguru tādṛk parārdha-
māryāgītiḥ |
The first and third quarters of this metre must con-
tain 12 syllabic instants each, and the third and fourth
20 each.
Ex. savadhūkāḥ sukhino'sminnavaratamamandarāgatāmarasadṛśaḥ |
nāsevante rasavannavaratamamandarāgatāmarasadṛśaḥ || Si. 4. 51.
Note. All these five sorts are sometimes defined
in the Gaṇa scheme.
(b) vaitālīya|
Def. ṣaḍviṣame'ṣṭau same kalāstāśca same syurnirantarāḥ |
na samātra parāśritā kalā vaitālīyeṃ'te ralau guruḥ ||
This is a stanza of four quarters, the first and third
of which contain the time of fourteen short syllables,
and the second and fourth sixteen. Again, the first
and third quarters of this metre must contain 6 sylla-
bic instants, and the second and fourth 8 each, follow-
ed by a ragaṇa (ᴗ – ᴗ) and a short and a long vowel,
(ᴗ –). The rules further require that the syllabic in-
stants in the even quarter should not be all composed
of short syllables or long syllables, and that the even
syllabic instant in each quarter (i. e. the 2nd, 4th
and 6th) should not be formed conjointly with the
next (i. e. 3rd, 5th, and 7th).
Ex. kuśalaṃ khalu tubhyameva tad-
vacanaṃ kṛṣṇa yadabhyadhāmaham |
upadeśaparāḥ pareṣvapi
svavināśābhimukheṣu sādhavaḥ | || Si. 16. 14.
(c) aupacchandasika
Def. paryante ryau tathaiva śeṣamaupacchandasikaṃ sudhībhiruktam |
This is the same as vaitālīya except that at the end of
each quarter there must be a ragaṇa and yagaṇa instead of
ragaṇa and la, ga only; in other words, it is the same as
vaitālīya with only a long syllable added at the end of
each quarter.
Ex. vapuṣā parameṇa bhūdharāṇā-
kmatha sambhāvya parākramaṃ bibhede |
mṛgamāśu vilokayāñcakāra
sthiradaṃṣṭrogramukhaṃ mahendrasūnuḥ || Ki. 13. 1.
So in the next 52 verses of the same canto.
See Si. 20 also
It will be noticed that viyoginī or sundarī and aparavaktra
are only particular cases of vaitālīya, and puṣpitāgrāṃ and
mālabhāriṇī, of aupacchandasika| Prosodists treat both these
classes of metres in the Gaṇa scheme as well as in the
Mātrā scheme; hence they have been noticed here as
well as in Section C.

kanya.name: kanyā
kanya.group: Metres with 4 Syllables in a quarter (pratiṣṭhā)
kanya.example: bhāsvatkanyā saikā dhanyā | yasyāḥ kūle kṛṣṇo'khelat ||

pankti.name: paṅkti
pankti.group: Metres with 5 Syllables in a quarter (supratiṣṭhā)

tanumadhyama.name: tanumadhyamā
tanumadhyama.group: Metres with 6 Syllables in a quarter (gāyatrī)
tanumadhyama.example:
mūrtirmuraśatroratyadbhutarūpā |
āstāṃ mama citte nityaṃ tanumadhyā ||

vidyullekha.name: vidyullekhā
vidyullekha.group: Metres with 6 Syllables in a quarter (gāyatrī)
vidyullekha.example:
śrīdīptī thīkīrtī dhīnītī gīḥprītī |
edhete dve dve te ye neme deveśe ||

sasivadana.name: śaśivadanā
sasivadana.group: Metres with 6 Syllables in a quarter (gāyatrī)

somaraji.name: somarājī
somaraji.group: Metres with 6 Syllables in a quarter (gāyatrī)
somaraji.example:
hare somarājī-samā te yaśaḥśrīḥ |
jaganmaṇḍalasya chinattyandhakarām ||

kumaralalita.name: kumāralalitā
kumaralalita.group: Metres with 7 Syllables in a quarter (uṣṇik)
kumaralalita.example:
murāritanuvallī kumāralalitā sā |
vrajaiṇanayanānāṃ tatāna mudamuccaiḥ ||

madalekha.name: madalekhā
madalekha.group: Metres with 7 Syllables in a quarter (uṣṇik)

madhumati.name: madhumatī
madhumati.group: Metres with 7 Syllables in a quarter (uṣṇik)

anustubh.name: anuṣṭubh
anustubh.group: Metres with 8 Syllables in a quarter (anuṣṭubh)
anustubh.def: śloke ṣaṣṭhaṃ guru jñeyaṃ sarvatra laghu pañcamam| dvicatuḥ pādayorhasvaṃ saptamaṃ dīrghamanyayoḥ ||
anustubh.example: vāgarthāviva sampṛktau vāgarthapratipattaye | jagataḥ pitarau vande pārvatīparameśvarau ||
notes: There are several varieties of this metre, but that which is most in use has eight syllables in each quarter, but of variable quantity. Thus the fifth syllable of each quarter should be short, the sixth long, and the seventh alternately long and short.

gajagati.name: gajagati
gajagati.group: Metres with 8 Syllables in a quarter (anuṣṭubh)
gajagati.example:
ravisutāparisare viharato dṛśi hareḥ |
vrajavadhūgajagatirmudamalaṃ vyatanuta ||

pramanika.name: pramāṇikā
pramanika.group: Metres with 8 Syllables in a quarter (anuṣṭubh)

manavaka.name: māṇavaka
manavaka.group: Metres with 8 Syllables in a quarter (anuṣṭubh)
manavaka.example:
cañcalacūḍaṃ capalairvatsakulaiḥ keliparam |
dhyāya sakhe smeramukhaṃ nandasutaṃ māṇavakam ||

vidyunmala.name: vidyunmālā
vidyunmala.group: Metres with 8 Syllables in a quarter (anuṣṭubh)
vidyunmala.example: vāsovallī vidyunmālā barhaśreṇī śākraścāpaḥ | yasminnāstāṃ tāpocchittyai gomadhyasthaḥ kṛṣṇāmbhodaḥ ||

samanika.name: samānikā
samanika.group: Metres with 8 Syllables in a quarter (anuṣṭubh)
samanika.example:
yasya kṛṣṇapādapadmamasti hṛttaḍāgasadma |
dhīḥ samānikā pareṇa nocitātra matsareṇa ||

bhujagasisubhrta.name: bhujagaśiśubhṛtā
bhujagasisubhrta.group: Metres with 9 Syllables in a quarter (vṛhatī)
bhujagasisubhrta.example:
hradataṭanikaṭakṣauṇī bhujagaśiśubhṛtā yā'sīt |
muraripudalite nāge vrajajanasukhadā sā ' bhūt ||

bhujangasangata.name: bhujaṅgasaṅgatā
bhujangasangata.group: Metres with 9 Syllables in a quarter (vṛhatī)
bhujangasangata.example:
taralā taraṅgiriṅgitairyamunā bhujaṅgasaṅgatā |
kathameti vatsacārakaścapalaḥ sadaiva tāṃ hariḥ ||

manimadhya.name: maṇimadhya
manimadhya.group: Metres with 9 Syllables in a quarter (vṛhatī)

tvaritagati.name: tvaritagati
tvaritagati.group: Metres with 10 Syllables in a quarter (paṅkti)
tvaritagati.example:
tvaritagatirvrajayuvatistaraṇisutā vipinagatā |
muraripuṇā ratiguruṇā pariramitā pramadamitā ||

matta.name: mattā
matta.group: Metres with 10 Syllables in a quarter (paṅkti)
matta.example: pītvā mattā madhu madhupālī kālindīye taṭavanakuñje | uddīvyantīr vrajajanarāmāḥ kāmāsaktā madhujiti cakre ||

rukmavati.name: rukmavatī
rukmavati.group: Metres with 10 Syllables in a quarter (paṅkti)
rukmavati.example: kāyamanovākyaiḥ pariśuddhairyasya sadā kaṃsadviṣi bhaktiḥ | rājyapade harmyālirudārā rukmavatī vighnaḥ khalu tasya ||

indravajra.name: indravajrā
indravajra.group: Metres with 11 Syllables in a quarter (triṣṭubh)
indravajra.example: goṣṭhe giriṃ savyakareṇa dhṛtvā ruṣṭendravajrāhatimuktavṛṣṭau| yo gokulaṃ gopakulaṃ ca susthaṃ cakre sa no rakṣatu cakrapāṇiḥ ||

upendravajra.name: upendravajrā
upendravajra.group: Metres with 11 Syllables in a quarter (triṣṭubh)
upendravajra.example: upedravajrādimaṇicchaṭābhirvibhaṣaṇānāṃ churitaṃ vapuste | smarāmi gopībhirupāsyamānaṃ surandrumūle maṇimaṇḍapastham ||

upajati.name: upajāti
upajati.group: Metres with 11 Syllables in a quarter (triṣṭubh)
upajati.def: anantarodīritalakṣmabhājau pādau yadīyāvupajātayastāḥ| itthaṃ kilānyāsvapi miśritāsu vadanti jātiṣvidameva nāma ||
upajati.example: astyuttarasyāṃ diśi devatātmā himālayo nāma nagādhirājaḥ| pūrvāparau toyanidhī vagāhya sthitaḥ pṛthivyā iva mānadaṇḍaḥ ||
notes: When indravajrā and upendravajrā are mixed in one stanza, the metre is called upajāti. It is said to have 14 varieties.

When other metres also are mixed in one stanza, the metre is still called upajāti; e. g. in the following verse from Māgha there is a combination of vaṃśastha and indravaṃśā. itthaṃ rathāśvebhaniṣādināṃ prage gajo nṛpāṇāmatha toraṇādbahiḥ prasthānakālakṣamaveśakalpanākṛtakṣaṇakṣepamudaikṣatācyutam

dodhaka.name: dodhaka
dodhaka.group: Metres with 11 Syllables in a quarter (triṣṭubh)
dodhaka.example: yā na yayau priyamanyavadhūbhyaḥ sāratarāgamanā yatamānam| tena saheha bibharti rahaḥ strī sāra tarāgamanāyatamānam ||

bhramaravilasitam.name: bhramaravilasitaṃ
bhramaravilasitam.group: Metres with 11 Syllables in a quarter (triṣṭubh)
bhramaravilasitam.example: prītyai yūnāṃ vyavahitatapanāḥ prauḍhadhvāntaṃ dinamiha jaladāḥ| doṣāmanyaṃ vidadhati surata krīḍāyāsaśramaśamapaṭavaḥ ||

rathoddhata.name: rathoddhatā
rathoddhata.group: Metres with 11 Syllables in a quarter (triṣṭubh)
rathoddhata.sch: ra, na, ra, la, ga. (3. 8. or 4. 8)
rathoddhata.example: kauśikena sa kila kṣitīśvaro rāmamadhvaravighātaśāntaye| kākapakṣadharametya yācitastejasāṃ hi na vayaḥ samīkṣyate ||

vatormi.name: vātormī
vatormi.group: Metres with 11 Syllables in a quarter (triṣṭubh)
vatormi.example: dhyātā mūrtiḥ kṣaṇamapyacyutasya śreṇī nāmnāṃ gaditā helayāpi| saṃsāre'smin duritaṃ hanti puṃsāṃ vātormī potamivāmbhodhimadhye ||

salini.name: śālinī
salini.group: Metres with 11 Syllables in a quarter (triṣṭubh)
salini.example: aṅgho hanti jñānavṛddhiṃ vidhatte dharmaṃ datte kāmamarthaṃ ca sūte| muktiṃ datte sarvadopāsyamānā puṃsāṃ śraddhāśālinī viṣṇubhaktiḥ ||

svagata.name: svāgatā
svagata.group: Metres with 11 Syllables in a quarter (triṣṭubh)
svagata.example: yāvadāgamayate'tha narendrān sa svayaṃvaramahāya mahīndraḥ| tāvadeva ṛṣirindradidṛkṣurnāradastridaśadhāma jagāma ||

indravamsa.name: indravaṃśā
indravamsa.group: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter (jagatī)
indravamsa.sch: indravaṃśā is the same as vaṃśasthavila or vaṃśastha | (see 13 below) except that its first syllable is long:-- The Ganas | are, ta, ja, ja, ra.
indravamsa.example: daityendravaṃśāgnirudīrṇadīdhitiḥ pītāmbaro'sau jagatāṃ tamopahaḥ| yasminmamajjuḥ śalabhā iva svayaṃ te kaṃsacāṇūramukhā makhadviṣaḥ ||

candravartma.name: candravartma
candravartma.group: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter (jagatī)
candravartma.example: candravartma vihitaṃ ghanatimiraiḥ rājavartma rahitaṃ janagamanaiḥ| iṣṭavartma tadalaṅkuru sarase kuñjavartmani haristava kutukī ||

jaladharamala.name: jaladharamālā
jaladharamala.group: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter (jagatī)
jaladharamala.example: yā bhaktānāṃ kaliduritottaptānāṃ tāpacchede jaladharamālā navyā| bhavyākārā dinakaraputrīkūle kelīlolā haritanuravyātsā vaḥ ||

jaloddhatagati.name: jaloddhatagati
jaloddhatagati.group: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter (jagatī)
jaloddhatagati.example: samīraśiśiraḥ śirassu vasatāṃ satāṃ javanikā nikāmasukhinām| bibharti janayannayaṃ mudamapāmapāyadhavalā balāhakatatīḥ ||

tamarasa.name: tāmarasa
tamarasa.group: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter (jagatī)
tamarasa.example: sphuṭasuṣamāmakarandamanojñaṃ vrajalalanānayanālinipītam| tava mukhatāmarasaṃ muraśatro hṛdayataḍāgavikāśi mamāstu ||

totaka.name: toṭaka
totaka.group: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter (jagatī)
totaka.example: sa tatheti vineturudāramateḥ pratigṛhya vaco visasarja munim| tadalabdhapadaṃ hṛdi śokaghane pratiyātamivāntikamasya guroḥ ||

drutavilambita.name: drutavilambita
drutavilambita.group: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter (jagatī)
drutavilambita.example: munisutāpraṇayasmṛtirodhinā mama ca muktamidaṃ tamasā manaḥ| manasijena sakhe prahariṣyatā dhanuṣi cūtaśaraśca niveśitaḥ ||

prabha.name: prabhā
prabha.group: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter (jagatī)
prabha.example: atisuramirabhāji puṣpaśriyā matanuta ratayeva santānakaḥ | taruṇaparabhṛtaḥ svanaṃ rāgiṇāmatanuta rataye vasantānakaḥ ||

pramitaksara.name: pramitākṣarā
pramitaksara.group: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter (jagatī)
pramitaksara.example: vihagāḥ kadambasurabhāviha gāḥ kalayantyanukṣaṇamanekalayam| bhramayannapaiti muhurabhramayaṃ pavanaśca dhūtanavanīpavanaḥ ||

bhujangaprayata.name: bhujaṅgaprayāta
bhujangaprayata.group: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter (jagatī)
bhujangaprayata.example: dhanairniṣkulīnāḥ kulīnā bhavanti dhanairāpadaṃ mānavā nistaranti | dhanebhyaḥ paro bāndhavo nāsti loke dhanānyarjayadhvaṃ dhanānyarjayadhvam ||

manimala.name: maṇimālā
manimala.group: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter (jagatī)
manimala.example: prahvāmaramaulau ratnopalakḷpte jātaprativimbā śoṇā maṇimālā | govindapadābje rājī nakharāṇā māstāṃ mama citte dhvāntaṃ śamayantī ||

malati.name: mālatī
malati.group: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter (jagatī)
malati.example: iha kalayācyutakelikānane madhurasasaurabhasāralolupaḥ |kusumakṛtasmitacāruvibhramāmalirapi cumbati mālatīṃ muhuḥ ||

vamsasthavila.name: vaṃśasthavila
vamsasthavila.group: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter (jagatī)
vamsasthavila.example: tathā samakṣaṃ dahatā ganobhavaṃ pinākinā bhagnamanorathā satī nininda rūpaṃ hṛdayena pārvatī priyeṣu saubhāgyaphalā hi cārutā ||

vaisvadevi.name: vaiśvadevī
vaisvadevi.group: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter (jagatī)
vaisvadevi.example: arcāmanyeṣāṃ tvaṃ vihāyāmarāṇāmadvaitenaikaṃ viṣṇumabhyarcya bhaktyā| tatrāśeṣātmanyarcite bhāvinī te bhrātaḥ sampannārādhanā vaiśvadevī ||

sragvini.name: sragviṇī
sragvini.group: Metres with 12 Syllables in a quarter (jagatī)
sragvini.example: indranīlopalīneva yā nirmitā śātakumbhadravālaṅkṛtā śobhate| navyameghacchaviḥ pītavāsā haremūrtirāstāṃ jayāyorasi sragviṇī ||

kalahamsa.name: kalahaṃsa
kalahamsa.group: Metres with 13 Syllables in a quarter (atijagatī)
kalahamsa.example: yamunāvihāgkutuke kalahaṃso vrajakāminīkamalinīkṛtakeliḥ | janacittahārikalakaṇṭhaninādaḥ pramadaṃ tanotu tava nandatanūjaḥ ||

ksama.name: kṣamā
ksama.group: Metres with 13 Syllables in a quarter (atijagatī)
ksama.example: iha duradhigamaiḥ kiñcidevāgamaiḥ satatamasutaraṃ varṇayantyantaram| amumativipinaṃ veda digvyāpinaṃ puruṣamiva paraṃ padmayoniḥ param ||

praharsini.name: praharṣiṇī
praharsini.group: Metres with 13 Syllables in a quarter (atijagatī)
praharsini.example: te rekhādhvajakuliśātapatracihnaṃ samrājaścaraṇayugaṃ prasādalabhyam| prasthānapraṇatibhiraṅgulīṣu cakrurmaulisrakcyutamakarandareṇugauram ||

manjubhasini.name: mañjubhāṣiṇī
manjubhasini.group: Metres with 13 Syllables in a quarter (atijagatī)
manjubhasini.example: yamunāmatītamatha śuśruvānamuṃ tapasastanūja iti nādhunocyate| sa yadā'calannijapurādaharniśaṃ nṛpatestadādi samacāri vārtayā ||

mattamayuri.name: mattamayūrī
mattamayuri.group: Metres with 13 Syllables in a quarter (atijagatī)
mattamayuri.example: dṛṣṭvā dṛśyānyācaraṇīyāni vidhāya prekṣākārī yāti yadaṃ muktamapāyaiḥ | samyagdṛṣṭistasya paraṃ paśyati yastvāṃ yaścopāste sādhu vidheyaṃ sa vidhatte ||

rucira.name: rucirā
rucira.group: Metres with 13 Syllables in a quarter (atijagatī)
rucira.example: kadā mukhaṃ varatanu kāraṇādṛte tavāgataṃ kṣaṇamapi kopapātratām| aparvaṇi grahakaluṣendumaṇḍalā vibhāvarī kathaya kathaṃ bhaviṣyati ||

aparajita.name: aparājitā
aparajita.group: Metres with 14 Syllables in a quarter (śakvarī)
aparajita.sch: na, na, ra, sa, la, ga (7. 7)
aparajita.example: yadanavadhibhujapratāpakṛtāspadā yadunicayacamūḥ parairaparājitā| vyajayata samare samastaripuvrajaṃ sa jayati jagatāṃ gatirgaruḍadhvajaḥ ||

asambadha.name: asambādhā
asambadha.group: Metres with 14 Syllables in a quarter (śakvarī)
asambadha.sch: ma, ta, na, sa, ga, ga (5. 9)
asambadha.example: vīryāgnau yena jvalati raṇavaśātkṣipte daityendre jātā dharaṇiriyamasambādhā | dharmasthityarthaṃ prakaṭitatanusambandhaḥ sādhūnāṃ bādhāṃ praśamayatu sa kaṃsāriḥ ||

pathya.name: pathyā
pathya.group: Metres with 14 Syllables in a quarter (śakvarī)
pathya.def: sajasā yalau ca saha gena pathyā matā ||
pathya.sch: sa, ja, sa, ya, la, ga (5. 9)
pathya.example: sthagayantyamūḥ śamitacātakārtasvarāḥ jaladāstaḍittulitakāntakārtasvarāḥ | jagatīriha sphuritacārucāmīkarāḥ savituḥ kvacitkapiśayanti cāmī karāḥ ||

pramada.name: pramadā
pramada.group: Metres with 14 Syllables in a quarter (śakvarī)
pramada.sch: na, ja, ma, ja, la, ga (6. 8)
pramada.example: anaticirojjhitasya jaladevacirasthitabahubudbudasya payaso'nukṛtim| viralavikīrṇavajraśakalā sakalāmiha vidadhāti dhautakaladhautamahī ||

praharanakalika.name: praharaṇakalikā
praharanakalika.group: Metres with 14 Syllables in a quarter (śakvarī)
praharanakalika.sch: na, na, bha, na, la, ga (7. 7)
praharanakalika.example: vyathayati kusumapraharaṇakalikā pramadavanabhavā tava dhanuṣi tatā| virahavipadi me śaraṇamiha tato madhumathanaguṇasmaraṇamaviratam ||

madhyaksama.name: madhyakṣāmā
madhyaksama.group: Metres with 14 Syllables in a quarter (śakvarī)
madhyaksama.sch: ma, bha, na, ya, ga, ga (4. 10)
madhyaksama.example: nītocchrāyaṃ muhuraśiśiraraśmerusrairānīlābhairviracitaparabhāgā ratnaiḥ | jyotsnāśaṅkāmiha vitarati haṃsaśyenī madhyepyahnaḥ sphaṭikarajatabhitticchāyā ||

vasantatilaka.name: vasantatilakā
vasantatilaka.group: Metres with 14 Syllables in a quarter (śakvarī)
vasantatilaka.sch: ta, bha, ja, ja, ga, ga (8. 6)
vasantatilaka.example: yātyekato'staśikharaṃ patiroṣadhīnāmāviṣkṛtāruṇapuraḥsara ekato'rkaḥ| tejodvayasya yugapad vyasanodayābhyāṃ loko niyamyata ivātmadaśāntareṣu ||

vasanti.name: vāsantī
vasanti.group: Metres with 14 Syllables in a quarter (śakvarī)
vasanti.def: mātto no mo gau yadi gaditā vāsantīyam ||
vasanti.sch: ma, ta, na, ma, ga, ga (4. 6. 4)
vasanti.example: bhrāmyadbhṛṅgīnirbharamadhurālāpodgītaiḥ śrīkhaṇḍādreradbhutapavanairmandāndolā | līlālolā pallavavilasaddhastollāsaiḥ kaṃsārātau nṛtyati sadṛśī vāsantīyam ||

tunaka.name: tūṇaka
tunaka.group: Metres with 15 Syllables in a quarter (atiśakvarī)
tunaka.sch: ra, ja, ra, ja, ra (4. 4. 4. 3, or 7. 8).
tunaka.example: sā suvarṇaketakaṃ vikāśi bhṛṅgapūritaṃ pañcabāṇabāṇajālapūrṇahetitūṇakam | rādhikā vitarkya mādhavādya māsi mādhave mohameti nirbharaṃ tvayā vinā kalānidhe ||

malini.name: mālinī
malini.group: Metres with 15 Syllables in a quarter (atiśakvarī)
malini.example: śaśinamupagateyaṃ kaumudī meghamuktaṃ jalanidhimanurūpaṃ jahnukanyāvatīrṇā | iti samaguṇayogaprītayastatra paurāḥ śravaṇakaṭu nṛpāṇāmekavākyaṃ vivavruḥ ||

lilakhela.name: līlākhela
lilakhela.group: Metres with 15 Syllables in a quarter (atiśakvarī)
lilakhela.example: mā kānte pakṣasyānte paryākāśe deśe svāpsīḥ kāntaṃ vaktraṃ vṛttaṃ pūrṇaṃ candraṃ matvā rātrau cet | kṣutkṣāmaḥ prāṭaṃścetaśceto rāhuḥ krūraḥ prādyāt tasmād dhvānte harmyasyānte śayyaikānte kartavyā ||

sasikala.name: śaśikalā
sasikala.group: Metres with 15 Syllables in a quarter (atiśakvarī)
sasikala.sch: na, na, na, na, sa (all short syllables except the last).

citra.name: citra
citra.group: Metres with 16 Syllables in a quarter (aṣṭi)
citra.def: vitrasañjñamīritaṃ rajau rajau ragau ca vṛttam ||
citra.sch: ra, ja, ra, ja, ra, ga (8. 8. or 4. 4. 4. 4.)
citra.example: vidrumāruṇādharauṣṭhaśobhiveṇuvādyahṛṣṭa vallavījanāṅgasaṅgajātamugdhakaṇṭhakāṅga | tvāṃ sadaiva vāsudeva puṇyalabhyapāda deva vanyapuṣpacitrakeśa saṃsmarāmi gopaveśa ||

pancacamara.name: pañcacāmara
pancacamara.group: Metres with 16 Syllables in a quarter (aṣṭi)
pancacamara.def: pramāṇikāpadadvayaṃ vadanti pañcacāmaram || or jarau jarau tato jagau ca pañcacāmaraṃ vadet ||
pancacamara.sch: ja, ra, ja, ra, ja, ga (8. 8. or 4. 4. 4. 4)
pancacamara.example: suradrumūlamaṇḍape vicitraratnanirmite lasadvitānabhūṣite salīlavibhramālasam | surāṅganābhavallavīkaraprapañcacāmarasphuratsamīravījitaṃ sadācyutaṃ bhajāmi tam ||

vanini.name: vāṇinī
vanini.group: Metres with 16 Syllables in a quarter (aṣṭi)
vanini.sch: na, ja, bha, ja, ra, ga.
vanini.example: sphuratu mamānane'dya nanu vāṇi nītiramyaṃ tavacaraṇaprasādaparipākataḥ kavitvam | bhavajalarāśipārakaraṇakṣamaṃ mukundaṃ satatamahaṃ stavaiḥ svacaritaiḥ stavāmi nityam ||

citralekha.name: citralekhā
citralekha.group: Metres with 18 Syllables in a quarter (dhṛti)
citralekha.sch: ma, bha, na, ya, ya, ya (4. 7. 7.)
citralekha.example: śaṅke'muṣmiñ jagati mṛgadṛśāṃ sārarūpaṃ yadāsīdākṛṣyedaṃ vrajayuvatisabhā vedhasā sā vyadhāyi | naitādṛk cet kathamudadhisutāmantareṇācyutasya prītaṃ tasyā nayanayugamabhūccitralekhādbhutāyām ||

nardataka.name: nardaṭaka
nardataka.group: Metres with 17 Syllables in a quarter (atyaṣṭi)
nardataka.def: yadi bhavato najau bhajajalā guru nardaṭakam ||
nardataka.sch: na, ja, bha, ja, ja, la, ga (8. 9)

prthvi.name: pṛthvī
prthvi.group: Metres with 17 Syllables in a quarter (atyaṣṭi)
prthvi.sch: ja, sa, ja, sa, ya, la, ga (8. 9)
prthvi.example: itaḥ svapiti keśavaḥ kulamitastadīyadviṣāmitaśca śaraṇārthiṃnaḥ śikhariṇāṃ gaṇāḥ śerate | itopi vaḍavānalaḥ saha samastasaṃvartakairaho vitatamūrjitaṃ narasahaṃ ca sindhorvapuḥ ||

mandakranta.name: mandākrāntā
mandakranta.group: Metres with 17 Syllables in a quarter (atyaṣṭi)
mandakranta.sch: ma, bha, na, ta, ta, ga, ga (4. 6. 7)
mandakranta.example: gopī bharturviharavidhurā kācidindīvarākṣī unmatteva skhalitakavarī niḥśvasantī viśālam | atraivāste muraripuriti bhrāntidūtīsaḍāyā tyaktvā gehaṃ jhaṭiti yamunāmañjukuñjaṃ jagāma ||
notes: (The whole of the "Meghadūta is written in this metre).

vamsapatrapatita.name: vaṃśapatrapatita
vamsapatrapatita.group: Metres with 17 Syllables in a quarter (atyaṣṭi)
vamsapatrapatita.sch: bha, ra, na, bha, na, la, ga (10. 7)
vamsapatrapatita.example: darpaṇanirmalāsu patite ghanatimiramuṣi jyotiṣi raupyabhittiṣu puraḥ pratiphalati muhuḥ | vrīḍamasaṃmukhopi ramaṇairapahṛtavasanāḥ kāñcanakandarāsu taruṇīriha nayati raviḥ ||

sikharini.name: śikhariṇī
sikharini.group: Metres with 17 Syllables in a quarter (atyaṣṭi)
sikharini.sch: ya, ma, na, sa, bha, la, ga (6. 11)
sikharini.example: digante śrūyante madamalitagaṇḍāḥ karaṭinaḥ kariṇyaḥ kāruṇyāspadamasamaśīlāḥ khalu mṛgāḥ | idānīṃ lokesminnanupamaśikhānāṃ punarayaṃ nakhānāṃ pāṇḍityaṃ prakaṭayatu kasmin mṛgapatiḥ ||

harini.name: hariṇī
harini.group: Metres with 17 Syllables in a quarter (atyaṣṭi)
harini.sch: na, sa, ma, ra, sa, la, ga (6. 4. 7)
harini.example: sutanu hṛdayātpratyādeśavyalīkamapaitu te kimapi manasaḥ saṃmoho me tadā balavānabhūt | prabalatamasāmevamprāyāḥ śubheṣu hi vṛttayaḥ srajamapi śirasyandhaḥ kṣiptāṃ dhunotyahiśaṅkayā ||

kusumitalatavellita.name: kusumitalatāvellitā
kusumitalatavellita.group: Metres with 18 Syllables in a quarter (dhṛti)
kusumitalatavellita.sch: ma, ta, na, ya, ya, ya (5. 6. 7)
kusumitalatavellita.example: krīḍatkālindīlalitalaharīvāribhirdākṣiṇātyairvātaiḥ kheladbhiḥ kusumitalatāvellitā mandamandam | bhṛṅgālīgītaiḥ kisalayakarollāsitairlāsyalakṣmīṃ tanvānā ceto rabhasataralaṃ cakrapāṇeścakāra ||

nandana.name: nandana
nandana.group: Metres with 18 Syllables in a quarter (dhṛti)
nandana.sch: na, ja, bha, ja, ra, ra (11. 7)
nandana.example: taraṇisutātaraṅgapavanaiḥ salīlamāndolitaṃ madhuripupādapaṅkajarajaḥsupūtapṛthvītalam | muraharacitraceṣṭitakalākalāpasaṃsmārakaṃ kṣititalanandanaṃ vraja sakhe sukhāya vṛndāvanam ||

naraca.name: nārāca
naraca.group: Metres with 18 Syllables in a quarter (dhṛti)
naraca.sch: na, na, ra, ra, ra, ra (8. 5, 5)
naraca.example: raghupatirapi jātavedoviśuddhāṃ pragṛhya priyāṃ priyasuhṛdi bibhīṣaṇe saṅkramayya śriyaṃ vairiṇaḥ | ravisutasahitena tenānuyātaḥ sasaumitriṇā bhujavijitavimānaratnādhirūḍhaḥ pratasthe purīm ||

sardulalalita.name: śārdūlalalita
sardulalalita.group: Metres with 18 Syllables in a quarter (dhṛti)
sardulalalita.def: maḥ so jaḥ satasā dineśaṛtubhiḥ śārdūlalalitam ||
sardulalalita.sch: ma, sa, ja, sa, ta, sa (12. 6.)
sardulalalita.example: kṛtvā kaṃsamṛge parākramavidhiṃ śārdūlalalitaṃ yaścakre kṣitibhārakāriṣu daraṃ caidyaprabhṛtiṣu | santoṣaṃ paramaṃ tu devanivahe trailokyaśaraṇaṃ śreyo naḥ sa tanotvapāramahimā lakṣmīpriyatamaḥ ||

meghavisphurjita.name: meghavisphūrjitā
meghavisphurjita.group: Metres with 19 Syllables in a quarter (atidhṛti)
meghavisphurjita.sch: ya, ma, na, sa, ra, ra, ga, (6. 6. 7)
meghavisphurjita.example: kadambāmodāḍhyā vipinapavanaḥ kekinaḥ kāntakekāḥ vinidrāḥ kandalyo diśi diśi mudā dardurā dṛptanādāḥ | niśā nṛtyadvidyudvilasitalasanmeghavisphūrjitā cet priyaḥ svādhīno'sau danujadalano rājyamasmātkimanyat ||

sardulavikridita.name: śārdūlavikrīḍita
sardulavikridita.group: Metres with 19 Syllables in a quarter (atidhṛti)
sardulavikridita.sch: ma, sa, ja, sa, ta, ta, ga (12. 7)
sardulavikridita.example: vedānteṣu yamāhurekapuruṣaṃ vyāpya sthitaṃ rodasī yasminnīśvara ityananyaviṣayaḥ śabdo yathārthākṣaraḥ | antaryaśca mumukṣubhirniyamitaprāṇādibhirmṛgyate sa sthāṇuḥ sthirabhaktiyogasulabho niḥśreyasāyāstu vaḥ ||

sumadhura.name: sumadhurā
sumadhura.group: Metres with 19 Syllables in a quarter (atidhṛti)
sumadhura.def: mrau bhnau mo no guruśced hayaṛturasairuktā sumadhurā ||
sumadhura.sch: ma, ra, bha, na, ma, na, ga (7. 6. 6)
sumadhura.example: vedārthān prākṛtastvaṃ vadasi na ca te jihvā nipatitā madhyāhne vīkṣase'rkaṃ na tava sahasā dṛṣṭirvicalitā | dīptāgnau pāṇimantaḥ kṣipasi sa ca te dagdho bhavati no cāritryāccārudattaṃ calayasi na te dehaṃ harati bhūḥ ||

surasa.name: surasā
surasa.group: Metres with 19 Syllables in a quarter (atidhṛti)
surasa.def: mrau bhnau yo no guruścet svaramunikaraṇairāha surasām ||
surasa.sch: ma, ra, bha, na, ya, na, ga (7. 7. 5)
surasa.example: kāmakrīḍāsatṛṣṇo madhusamayasamārambharabhasāt kālindīkūlakuñje viharaṇakutukākṛṣṭahṛdayaḥ | govindo ballavīnāmadhararasasudhāṃ prāpya surasāṃ śaṅke pīyūṣapānaiḥ pracayakṛtasukhaṃ vyasmaradasau ||

gitika.name: gītikā
gitika.group: Metres with 20 Syllables in a quarter (kṛti)
gitika.def: sajasā bharau salagā yadā kathitā tadā khalu gītikā ||
gitika.sch: sa, ja, sa, bha, ra, sa, la, ga (5. 7. 8)
gitika.example: karatālacañcalakaṅkaṇasvanamiśraṇena manoramā ramaṇīyaveṇuninādaraṅgimasaṅgamena sukhāvahā | bahalānurāganivāsarāsasamudbhavā tava rāgiṇaṃ vidadhau hariṃ khalu vallavījanacārucāmaragītikā ||

suvadana.name: suvadanā
suvadana.group: Metres with 20 Syllables in a quarter (kṛti)
suvadana.sch: ma, ra, bha, na, ya, ma, la, ga (7. 7. 6)
suvadana.example: uttuṅgāstuṅgakūlaṃ srutamadasalilāḥ prasyandi salilaṃ śyāmāḥ śyāmopakaṇṭhadrumamatimukharāḥ kallolamukharam | srotaḥkhātāvasīdattaṭamurudaśanairutsāditataṭāḥ śoṇaṃ sindūraśoṇā mama gajapatayaḥ pāsyanti śataśaḥ ||

pancakavali.name: pañcakāvalī
pancakavali.group: Metres with 21 Syllables in a quarter (prakṛti)
pancakavali.def: najabhajajā jarau narapate kathitā bhuvi pañcakāvalī ||
pancakavali.sch: na, ja, bha, ja, ja, ja, ra (7. 7. 7)
pancakavali.example: turagaśatākulasya paritaḥ paramekatu raṅgajanmanaḥ pramathitabhūbhṛtaḥ pratipathaṃ mathitasya bhṛśaṃ mahībhṛtā | paricalato balānujabalasya puraḥ satataṃ dhṛtaśriyaściragalitaśriyo jalanidheśca tadā'bhavadantaraṃ mahat ||

sragdhara.name: sragdharā
sragdhara.group: Metres with 21 Syllables in a quarter (prakṛti)
sragdhara.sch: ma, ra, bha, na, ya, ya, ya (7. 7. 7.)
sragdhara.example: yā sṛṣṭiḥ sraṣṭurādyā vahat vidhihutaṃ yā haviryā ca hotrī ya dve kālaṃ vidhattaḥ śrutiviṣayaguṇā yā sthitā vyāpya viśvam | yāmāhuḥ sarvabhūtaprakṛtiriti yayā prāṇinaḥ prāṇavantaḥ pratyakṣābhiḥ prapannastanubhiravatu vastābhiraṣṭābhirīśaḥ ||

hamsi.name: haṃsī
hamsi.group: Metres with 22 Syllables in a quarter (ākṛti)
hamsi.def: mau gau nāścatvāro go go vasubhuvanayatiriti bhavati haṃsī ||
hamsi.sch: ma, ma, ta, na, na, na, ta, ga (8. 14)
hamsi.example: sārdhaṃ kāntenaikānte'sau vikacakamalamadhusurami pibantī kāmakrīḍākūtasphītapramadasarasataramalaghu rasantī | kālindīye padmāraṇye pavanapatanaparitaralaparāge kaṃsārāte paśya svecchaṃ sarabhasagatiriha vilasati haṃsī ||

adritanaya.name: adritanayā
adritanaya.group: Metres with 23 Syllables in a quarter (vikṛti)
adritanaya.sch: na, ja, bha, ja, bha, ja, bha, la, ga (11. 12)
adritanaya.example: kharataraśauryapāvakaśikhāpataṅganibhamagnadṛptadanujo jaladhisutāvilāsavasatiḥ satāṃ gatiraśeṣamānyamahimā | bhuvanahitāvatāracaturaścarācaradharo'vatīrṇa iha hi kṣitivalaye'sti kaṃsaśamanastaveti tamavocadadritanayā ||

tanvi.name: tanvī
tanvi.group: Metres with 24 Syllables in a quarter (saṃskṛti)
tanvi.def: bhūtamunīnairyatiriha bhatanāḥ sbhau bhanayāśca yati bhavati tanvī.
tanvi.sch: bha, ta, na, sa, bha, bha, na, ya (5. 7. 11)

krauncapada.name: krauñcapadā
krauncapada.group: Metres with 25 Syllables in a quarter (atikṛti)
krauncapada.def: krauñcapadā bhmau sbhau nananā gāviṣuśaravasumuniviratiriha bhavet ||
krauncapada.sch: bha, ma, sa, bha, na, na, na, ga (5. 5. 8. 7)

bhujangavijrmbhita.name: bhujaṅgavijṛmbhita
bhujangavijrmbhita.group: Metres with 26 Syllables in a quarter (utkṛti)
bhujangavijrmbhita.sch: ma, ma, ta, na, na, ra, sa, la, ga (8. 11. 7)

dandaka.name: daṇḍaka
dandaka.group: Metres with 26 Syllables in a quarter (utkṛti)
notes: Metres with 27 or more letters in each quarter are designated by the
general name daṇḍaka. The highest number of syllables in a quarter of
this species of metre is said to be 999. In each quarter there must be
first two naganas or six short syllables, and the remaining may be
either raganas or yaganas, or all the feet may be saganas.
The classes of daṇḍaka usually mentioned are caṇḍavṛṣṭiprayāta,
pracitaka, mattamātaṅgalīlākara, siṃhavikrānta,
kusumastavaka, anaṅgaśekhara, saṅgrāma &c. Mál. 5. 23 is an
instance of this last species of Daṇḍaka.

aparavaktra.name: aparavaktra
aparavaktra.def: ayuji nanaralā guruḥ same | tadaparavaktramidaṃ najau jarau ||
aparavaktra.sch: na, na, ra, la, ga, (odd quarter) | na, ja, ja, ra (even quarter)
aparavaktra.example: sphuṭasumadhuraveṇugītimistamaparavaktramavetya mādhavam| mṛgayuvatigaṇaiḥ samaṃ sthitā vrajavanitā dhṛtacittavibhramā ||

upacitra.name: upacitra
upacitra.def: viṣame yadi sau salagā dale | bhau yuji bhādgurukāvupacitram ||
upacitra.sch: sa, sa, sa, la, ga (odd quarter) bha, bha, bha, ga, ga (even | quarter)
upacitra.example: muravairivapustanutāṃ mudaṃ hemanibhāṃśukacandanaliptam| gaganaṃ capalāmilitaṃ yathā śāradanīradharairupacitram ||

puspitagra.name: puṣpitāgrā
puspitagra.def: ayuji nayugarephato yakāro | yuji tu najau jaragāśca puṣpitāgrā ||
puspitagra.sch: na, na, ra, ya (odd quarter) | na, ja, ja, ra, ga (even quarter)
puspitagra.example: atha madanavadhūrupaplavāntaṃ vyasanakṛśā paripālayāmbabhūva| śaśina iva divātanasya lekhā kiraṇaparikṣayadhūsarā pradoṣam ||

viyogini.name: viyoginī
viyogini.def: viṣame samajā guruḥ same | sabharā lo'tha guruviṃyoginī ||
viyogini.sch: sa, sa, ja, ga (odd quarter) | sa, bha, ra, la, ga (even quarter)
viyogini.example: sahasā vidadhīta na kriyāmavivekaḥ paramāpadāṃ padam| vṛṇate hi vimṛśyakāriṇaṃ guṇalubdhāḥ svayameva sampadaḥ ||

vegavati.name: vegavatī
vegavati.def: sayugātsagurū viṣame ced | bhāviha vegavatī yuji bhādgau ||
vegavati.sch: sa, sa, sa, ga (odd quarter) | bha, bha, bha, ga (even quarter)
vegavati.example: smaravegavatī vrajarāmā keśavavaṃśaravairatimugdhā| rabhasānna gurūn gaṇayantī kelinikuñjagṛhāya jagāma ||

harinapluta.name: hariṇaplutā
harinapluta.def: sayugātsalaghū viṣame guru- ryuji nabhau bharakau hariṇaplutā ||
harinapluta.sch: sa, sa, sa, la, ga (odd quarter). | na, bha, bha, ra (even quarter).
harinapluta.example: sphuṭaphenacayā hariṇaplutā balimanojñataṭā taraṇeḥ sutā| kalahaṃsakulāravaśālinī viharato harati sma harermanaḥ ||
notes:
N. B. Metres like aparavaktra or aupacchandasika and vaitālayi or
viyoginī are usually treated as jātis; (see Section D). But they are
sometimes defined in the Gaṇa scheme, and are, therefore, given under
the class of Vṛittas.

udgata.name: udgatā
udgata.section: SECTION C. - viṣamavṛtta (Unequal Metres). The most common metre of this class is called udgatā
udgata.def: prathame sajau yadi salau ca nasajagurukāṇyanantaram | yadyatha bhanajalagāḥ syuratho sajasā jagau ca bhavatīyamudgatā ||
udgata.sch: sa, ja, sa, la (first quarter) | na, sa, ja, ga (second) | bha, na, ja, la, ga, (third) | sa, ja, sa, ja, ga, (fourth)
udgata.example: atha vāsavasya vacanena ruciravadanastrilocanam| klāntirahitamabhirādhayituṃ vidhivattapāṃsi vidadhe dhanañjayaḥ ||
notes:
Another variety of udgatā is mentioned wherein the third quarter has
bha, na, bha, ga instead of bha, na, ja, la, ga. Other kinds of metre in
which every quarter of the stanza differs in the number of syllables,
are included under the general name 'Gāthā'. The same name is applicable
to stanzas consisting of any number of quarters other than four. As in
the case of upajāti, any two or more quarters of a regular metre may be
combined to form ardhasamavṛtta or viṣamavṛtta.

arya.name: āryā
arya.section: SECTION D. - jāti (Metres regulated by the number of syllabic instants)
arya.def: yasyāḥ pāde prathame dvādaśamātrāstathā tṛtīyepi | aṣṭādaśa dvitīye caturthake pañcadaśa sāryā ||
arya.example: pratipakṣeṇāpi patiṃ sevante bhartṛvatsalāḥ sādhvyaḥ | anyasaritāṃ śatāni hi samudragāḥ prāpayantyabdhim ||
notes: The first and third quarters must each contain 12 mātrās or syllabic
instants (one being allotted to a short vowel, and two to a long one),
the second 18, and the fourth 15.
The whole of Govardhana's āryāsaptaśatī is written in this metre.

giti.name: gīti
giti.section: SECTION D. - jāti (Metres regulated by the number of syllabic instants)
giti.def: āryāpūrvārdhasamaṃ dvitīyamapi bhavati yatra haṃsagate | chandovidastadānīṃ gītiṃ tāmamṛtavāṇi bhāṣate ||
giti.example: pāṭīra tava paṭīyānkaḥ paripāṭīmimāmurīkartum | yatpiṃṣatāmapi nṛṇāṃ piṣṭo'pi tanoṣi parimalaiḥ puṣṭim ||
notes: The first and third quarters of this metre must contain 12 syllabic
instants each, and the second and fourth 18 each.

upagiti.name: upagīti
upagiti.section: SECTION D. - jāti (Metres regulated by the number of syllabic instants)
upagiti.def: āryottarārdhatulyaṃ prathamārdhamapi prayuktaṃ cet. kāmini tāmupagīti pratibhāṣante mahākavayaḥ ||
upagiti.example:
natagopasundarīṇāṃ rāsollāse murārātim |
asmārayadupagītiḥ svargakuraṅgadṛśāṃ gīteḥ ||
notes: The first and third quarters of this metre must contain 12 syllabic
instants each, and the second and fourth 15 each.

udgiti.name: udgīti
udgiti.section: SECTION D. - jāti (Metres regulated by the number of syllabic instants)
notes: The first and third quarters of this metre must contain 12 syllabic instants each, the second 15, and the fourth 18.

aryagiti.name: āryāgīti
aryagiti.section: SECTION D. - jāti (Metres regulated by the number of syllabic instants)
notes: The first and third quarters of this metre must contain 12 syllabic instants each, and the third and fourth 20 each.
Note. All these five sorts are sometimes defined in the Gaṇa scheme.

vaitaliya.name: vaitālīya
vaitaliya.section: SECTION D. - jāti (Metres regulated by the number of syllabic instants)
vaitaliya.def: ṣaḍviṣame'ṣṭau same kalāstāśca same syurnirantarāḥ | na samātra parāśritā kalā vaitālīyeṃ'te ralau guruḥ ||
vaitaliya.example: kuśalaṃ khalu tubhyameva tadvacanaṃ kṛṣṇa yadabhyadhāmaham | upadeśaparāḥ pareṣvapi svavināśābhimukheṣu sādhavaḥ ||
notes: This is a stanza of four quarters, the first and third of which contain the time of fourteen short syllables, and the second and fourth sixteen. Again, the first and third quarters of this metre must contain 6 syllabic instants, and the second and fourth 8 each, followed by a ragaṇa (ᴗ -- ᴗ) and a short and a long vowel, (ᴗ --). The rules further require that the syllabic instants in the even quarter should not be all composed of short syllables or long syllables, and that the even syllabic instant in each quarter (i. e. the 2nd, 4th and 6th) should not be formed conjointly with the next (i. e. 3rd, 5th, and 7th).

aupacchandasika.name: aupacchandasika
aupacchandasika.example: vapuṣā parameṇa bhūdharāṇākmatha sambhāvya parākramaṃ bibhede| mṛgamāśu vilokayāñcakāra sthiradaṃṣṭrogramukhaṃ mahendrasūnuḥ ||
notes: This is the same as vaitālīya except that at the end of each quarter there must be a ragaṇa and yagaṇa instead of ragaṇa and la, ga only; in other words, it is the same as vaitālīya with only a long syllable added at the end of each quarter.

So in the next 52 verses of the same canto.
It will be noticed that viyoginī or sundarī and aparavaktra are only
particular cases of vaitālīya, and puṣpitāgrāṃ and mālabhāriṇī, of
aupacchandasika. Prosodists treat both these classes of metres in the
Gaṇa scheme as well as in the Mātrā scheme; hence they have been noticed
here as well as in Section C.

matrasamaka.name: mātrāsamaka
matrasamaka.example: mūḍha jahīhi dhanāgamatṛṣṇāṃ kuru tanubuddhe manasi vitṛṣṇām| yallabhase nijakarmopāttaṃ vittaṃ tena vinodaya cittam ||
notes: The metre called mātrāsamaka consists of four quarters each of which contains 16 syllabic instants. The most general variety is that in which the ninth syllabic instant is composed of a short syllable, and the last is a long syllable. It is defined as mātrāsamakaṃ navamo lgāntyaḥ. But there are several varieties of this metre arising from particular syllabic instants being short or long. For example, if the 9th and 12th moments are formed by short syllables, and the 15th and 16th by a long one, and the rest are optional, it is called vānavāsikā. If the 5th, 8th, and 9th are formed by short syllables, and the 15th and 16th by a long one, it is called citrā. If the 5th and 8th are short, as also the 9th and 10th, and 15th and 16th are long' it is called upacitrā. And if the 5th, 8th, and 12th are short, 15th and 16th long, and the rest indeterminate, it is called viśloka. Sometimes two or more of these varieties are combined in the same stanza, and in that case the measure is called pādākulaka, in which there is no other restriction than that each quarter should have sixteen syllabic instants.
